seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

title: Hymn of Blessing
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: We worship the Father of Light, and His only-begotten Son, and the Spirit, the Paraclete; the Trinity, one in essence.
cells.coptic: Ⲧⲉⲛⲟⲩⲱϣⲧ ⲙ̀Ⲫⲓⲱⲧ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲓⲟⲩⲱⲓⲛⲓ: ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡⲉϥϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲛⲟⲅⲉⲛⲏⲥ: ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ⲙ̀ⲡⲁⲣⲁⲕⲗⲏⲧⲟⲛ: Ϯⲧ̀ⲣⲓⲁⲥ ⲛ̀ⲟ̀ⲙⲟⲟⲩⲥⲓⲟⲥ.
cells.arabic: نسجدُ لآب النور، وإبنِه الوحيد، والروحِ المعزي الثالوث المساوي.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The blessings of the evangelist and theologian: John the virgin: shall come upon this congregation: all say Amen so be it.
cells.coptic: Ⲉⲣⲉ ⲡⲓⲥ̀ⲙⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲓⲑⲉⲟ̀ⲗⲟⲅⲟⲥ ⲛ̀ⲉⲩⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲓⲥⲧⲏⲥ Ⲓⲱⲁⲛⲛⲓⲥ ⲡⲓⲡⲁⲣⲑⲉⲛⲟⲥ: ⲉϥⲉ̀ⲓ̀ ⲉ̀ϩ̀ⲣⲏⲓ ⲉ̀ϫⲉⲛ ⲡⲁⲓⲗⲁⲟⲥ ⲁ̀ϫⲟⲥ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ: ϫⲉ ⲁ̀ⲙⲏⲛ ⲉⲥⲉ̀ϣⲱⲡⲓ.
cells.arabic: بركة اللاهوتي الإنجيلي يوحنا البتول تأتي وتحل على هذا الشعب كله ، قولوا كلكم آمين يكون

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The Revelation of Jesus Christ, which God gave Him to show His servants—things which must shortly take place. And He sent and signified it by His angel to His servant John,
cells.arabic: إِعْلاَنُ يَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحِ، الَّذِي أَعْطَاهُ إِيَّاهُ اللهُ، لِيُرِيَ عَبِيدَهُ مَا لاَ بُدَّ أَنْ يَكُونَ عَنْ قَرِيبٍ، وَبَيَّنَهُ مُرْسِلاً بِيَدِ مَلاَكِهِ لِعَبْدِهِ يُوحَنَّا،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: who bore witness to the word of God, and to the testimony of Jesus Christ, to all things that he saw.
cells.arabic: الَّذِي شَهِدَ بِكَلِمَةِ اللهِ وَبِشَهَادَةِ يَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحِ بِكُلِّ مَا رَآهُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Blessed is he who reads and those who hear the words of this prophecy, and keep those things which are written in it; for the time is near.
cells.arabic: طُوبَى لِلَّذِي يَقْرَأُ وَلِلَّذِينَ يَسْمَعُونَ أَقْوَالَ النُّبُوَّةِ، وَيَحْفَظُونَ مَا هُوَ مَكْتُوبٌ فِيهَا، لأَنَّ الْوَقْتَ قَرِيبٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: John, to the seven churches which are in Asia: Grace to you and peace from Him who is and who was and who is to come, and from the seven Spirits who are before His throne,
cells.arabic: يُوحَنَّا، إِلَى السَّبْعِ الْكَنَائِسِ الَّتِي فِي أَسِيَّا: نِعْمَةٌ لَكُمْ وَسَلاَمٌ مِنَ الْكَائِنِ وَالَّذِي كَانَ وَالَّذِي يَأْتِي، وَمِنَ السَّبْعَةِ الأَرْوَاحِ الَّتِي أَمَامَ عَرْشِهِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness, the firstborn from the dead, and the ruler over the kings of the earth. To Him who loved us and washed us from our sins in His own blood,
cells.arabic: وَمِنْ يَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحِ الشَّاهِدِ الأَمِينِ، الْبِكْرِ مِنَ الأَمْوَاتِ، وَرَئِيسِ مُلُوكِ الأَرْضِ. الَّذِي أَحَبَّنَا، وَقَدْ غَسَّلَنَا مِنْ خَطَايَانَا بِدَمِهِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and has made us kings and priests to His God and Father, to Him be glory and dominion forever and ever. Amen.
cells.arabic: وَجَعَلَنَا مُلُوكاً وَكَهَنَةً لِلَّهِ أَبِيهِ، لَهُ الْمَجْدُ وَالسُّلْطَانُ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ. آمِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Behold, He is coming with clouds, and every eye will see Him, even they who pierced Him. And all the tribes of the earth will mourn because of Him. Even so, Amen.
cells.arabic: هُوَذَا يَأْتِي مَعَ السَّحَابِ، وَسَتَنْظُرُهُ كُلُّ عَيْنٍ، وَالَّذِينَ طَعَنُوهُ، وَيَنُوحُ عَلَيْهِ جَمِيعُ قَبَائِلِ الأَرْضِ. نَعَمْ آمِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “I am the Alpha and the Omega, the Beginning and the End,” says the Lord, “who is and who was and who is to come, the Almighty.”
cells.arabic: أَنَا هُوَ الأَلِفُ وَالْيَاءُ، الْبَِدَايَةُ وَالنِّهَايَةُ، يَقُولُ الرَّبُّ الْكَائِنُ وَالَّذِي كَانَ وَالَّذِي يَأْتِي، الْقَادِرُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I, John, both your brother and companion in the tribulation and kingdom and patience of Jesus Christ, was on the island that is called Patmos for the word of God and for the testimony of Jesus Christ.
cells.arabic: أَنَا يُوحَنَّا أَخُوكُمْ وَشَرِيكُكُمْ فِي الضِّيقَةِ وَفِي مَلَكُوتِ يَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحِ وَصَبْرِهِ. كُنْتُ فِي الْجَزِيرَةِ الَّتِي تُدْعَى بَطْمُسَ مِنْ أَجْلِ كَلِمَةِ اللهِ وَمِنْ أَجْلِ شَهَادَةِ يَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I was in the Spirit on the Lord’s Day, and I heard behind me a loud voice, as of a trumpet,
cells.arabic: كُنْتُ فِي الرُّوحِ فِي يَوْمِ الرَّبِّ، وَسَمِعْتُ وَرَائِي صَوْتاً عَظِيماً كَصَوْتِ بُوقٍ

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: saying, “I am the Alpha and the Omega, the First and the Last,” and, “What you see, write in a book and send it to the seven churches which are in Asia: to Ephesus, to Smyrna, to Pergamos, to Thyatira, to Sardis, to Philadelphia, and to Laodicea.”
cells.arabic: قَائِلاً: «أَنَا هُوَ الأَلِفُ وَالْيَاءُ. الأَوَّلُ وَالآخِرُ. وَالَّذِي تَرَاهُ اكْتُبْ فِي كِتَابٍ وَأَرْسِلْ إِلَى السَّبْعِ الْكَنَائِسِ الَّتِي فِي أَسِيَّا: إِلَى أَفَسُسَ، وَإِلَى سِمِيرْنَا، وَإِلَى بَرْغَامُسَ، وَإِلَى ثَِيَاتِيرَا، وَإِلَى سَارْدِسَ، وَإِلَى فِيلاَدَلْفِيَا، وَإِلَى لاَوُدِكِيَّةَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I turned to see the voice that spoke with me. And having turned I saw seven golden lampstands,
cells.arabic: فَالْتَفَتُّ لأَنْظُرَ الصَّوْتَ الَّذِي تَكَلَّمَ مَعِي. وَلَمَّا الْتَفَتُّ رَأَيْتُ سَبْعَ مَنَايِرَ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and in the midst of the seven lampstands One like the Son of Man, clothed with a garment down to the feet and girded about the chest with a golden band.
cells.arabic: وَفِي وَسَطِ السَّبْعِ الْمَنَايِرِ شِبْهُ ابْنِ إِنْسَانٍ، مُتَسَرْبِلاً بِثَوْبٍ إِلَى الرِّجْلَيْنِ، وَمُتَمَنْطِقاً عِنْدَ ثَدْيَيْهِ بِمِنْطَقَةٍ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: His head and hair were white like wool, as white as snow, and His eyes like a flame of fire;
cells.arabic: وَأَمَّا رَأْسُهُ وَشَعْرُهُ فَأَبْيَضَانِ كَالصُّوفِ الأَبْيَضِ كَالثَّلْجِ، وَعَيْنَاهُ كَلَهِيبِ نَارٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: His feet were like fine brass, as if refined in a furnace, and His voice as the sound of many waters;
cells.arabic: وَرِجْلاَهُ شِبْهُ النُّحَاسِ النَّقِيِّ، كَأَنَّهُمَا مَحْمِيَّتَانِ فِي أَتُونٍ. وَصَوْتُهُ كَصَوْتِ مِيَاهٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He had in His right hand seven stars, out of His mouth went a sharp two-edged sword, and His countenance was like the sun shining in its strength.
cells.arabic: وَمَعَهُ فِي يَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى سَبْعَةُ كَوَاكِبَ، وَسَيْفٌ مَاضٍ ذُو حَدَّيْنِ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ فَمِهِ، وَوَجْهُهُ كَالشَّمْسِ وَهِيَ تُضِيءُ فِي قُوَّتِهَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And when I saw Him, I fell at His feet as dead. But He laid His right hand on me, saying to me, “Do not be afraid; I am the First and the Last.
cells.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَيْتُهُ سَقَطْتُ عِنْدَ رِجْلَيْهِ كَمَيِّتٍ، فَوَضَعَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى عَلَيَّ قَائِلاً لِي: «لاَ تَخَفْ، أَنَا هُوَ الأَوَّلُ وَالآخِرُ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I am He who lives, and was dead, and behold, I am alive forevermore. Amen. And I have the keys of Hades and of Death.
cells.arabic: وَالْحَيُّ. وَكُنْتُ مَيْتاً وَهَا أَنَا حَيٌّ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ. آمِينَ. وَلِي مَفَاتِيحُ الْهَاوِيَةِ وَالْمَوْتِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Write the things which you have seen, and the things which are, and the things which will take place after this.
cells.arabic: فَاكْتُبْ مَا رَأَيْتَ، وَمَا هُوَ كَائِنٌ، وَمَا هُوَ عَتِيدٌ أَنْ يَكُونَ بَعْدَ هَذَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The mystery of the seven stars which you saw in My right hand, and the seven golden lampstands: The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the seven lampstands which you saw are the seven churches.
cells.arabic: سِرُّ السَّبْعَةِ الْكَوَاكِبِ الَّتِي رَأَيْتَ عَلَى يَمِينِي، وَالسَّبْعِ الْمَنَايِرِ الذَّهَبِيَّةِ: السَّبْعَةُ الْكَوَاكِبُ هِيَ مَلاَئِكَةُ السَّبْعِ الْكَنَائِسِ، وَالْمَنَايِرُ السَّبْعُ الَّتِي رَأَيْتَهَا هِيَ السَّبْعُ الْكَنَائِسِ».

title: Revelation 2
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

title: Revelation 3
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: After these things I looked, and behold, a door standing open in heaven. And the first voice which I heard was like a trumpet speaking with me, saying, “Come up here, and I will show you things which must take place after this.”
cells.arabic: بَعْدَ هَذَا نَظَرْتُ وَإِذَا بَابٌ مَفْتُوحٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ، وَالصَّوْتُ الأَوَّلُ الَّذِي سَمِعْتُهُ كَبُوقٍ يَتَكَلَّمُ مَعِي قَائِلاً: «اصْعَدْ إِلَى هُنَا فَأُرِيَكَ مَا لاَ بُدَّ أَنْ يَصِيرَ بَعْدَ هَذَا».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Immediately I was in the Spirit; and behold, a throne set in heaven, and One sat on the throne.
cells.arabic: وَلِلْوَقْتِ صِرْتُ فِي الرُّوحِ، وَإِذَا عَرْشٌ مَوْضُوعٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ، وَعَلَى الْعَرْشِ جَالِسٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And He who sat there was like a jasper and a sardius stone in appearance; and there was a rainbow around the throne, in appearance like an emerald.
cells.arabic: وَكَانَ الْجَالِسُ فِي الْمَنْظَرِ شِبْهَ حَجَرِ الْيَشْبِ وَالْعَقِيقِ، وَقَوْسُ قُزَحَ حَوْلَ الْعَرْشِ فِي الْمَنْظَرِ شِبْهُ الزُّمُرُّدِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Around the throne were twenty-four thrones, and on the thrones I saw twenty-four elders sitting, clothed in white robes; and they had crowns of gold on their heads.
cells.arabic: وَحَوْلَ الْعَرْشِ أَرْبَعَةٌ وَعِشْرُونَ عَرْشاً. وَرَأَيْتُ عَلَى الْعُرُوشِ أَرْبَعَةً وَعِشْرِينَ شَيْخاً جَالِسِينَ مُتَسَرْبِلِينَ بِثِيَابٍ بِيضٍ، وَعَلَى رُؤُوسِهِمْ أَكَالِيلُ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And from the throne proceeded lightnings, thunderings, and voices. Seven lamps of fire were burning before the throne, which are the seven Spirits of God.
cells.arabic: وَمِنَ الْعَرْشِ يَخْرُجُ بُرُوقٌ وَرُعُودٌ وَأَصْوَاتٌ. وَأَمَامَ الْعَرْشِ سَبْعَةُ مَصَابِيحِ نَارٍ مُتَّقِدَةٌ، هِيَ سَبْعَةُ أَرْوَاحِ اللهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Before the throne there was a sea of glass, like crystal. And in the midst of the throne, and around the throne, were four living creatures full of eyes in front and in back.
cells.arabic: وَقُدَّامَ الْعَرْشِ بَحْرُ زُجَاجٍ شِبْهُ الْبَلُّورِ. وَفِي وَسَطِ الْعَرْشِ وَحَوْلَ الْعَرْشِ أَرْبَعَةُ حَيَوَانَاتٍ مَمْلُوَّةٌ عُيُوناً مِنْ قُدَّامٍ وَمِنْ وَرَاءٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The first living creature was like a lion, the second living creature like a calf, the third living creature had a face like a man, and the fourth living creature was like a flying eagle.
cells.arabic: وَالْحَيَوَانُ الأَوَّلُ شِبْهُ أَسَدٍ، وَالْحَيَوَانُ الثَّانِي شِبْهُ عِجْلٍ، وَالْحَيَوَانُ الثَّالِثُ لَهُ وَجْهٌ مِثْلُ وَجْهِ إِنْسَانٍ، وَالْحَيَوَانُ الرَّابِعُ شِبْهُ نَسْرٍ طَائِرٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The four living creatures, each having six wings, were full of eyes around and within. And they do not rest day or night, saying: “Holy, holy, holy, Lord God Almighty, Who was and is and is to come!”
cells.arabic: وَالأَرْبَعَةُ الْحَيَوَانَاتُ لِكُلِّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهَا سِتَّةُ أَجْنِحَةٍ حَوْلَهَا وَمِنْ دَاخِلٍ مَمْلُوَّةٌ عُيُوناً، وَلاَ تَزَالُ نَهَاراً وَلَيْلاً قَائِلَةً: «قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ قُدُّوسٌ، الرَّبُّ الْإِلَهُ الْقَادِرُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، الَّذِي كَانَ وَالْكَائِنُ وَالَّذِي يَأْتِي».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Whenever the living creatures give glory and honor and thanks to Him who sits on the throne, who lives forever and ever,
cells.arabic: وَحِينَمَا تُعْطِي الْحَيَوَانَاتُ مَجْداً وَكَرَامَةً وَشُكْراً لِلْجَالِسِ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ، الْحَيِّ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: the twenty-four elders fall down before Him who sits on the throne and worship Him who lives forever and ever, and cast their crowns before the throne, saying:
cells.arabic: يَخِرُّ الأَرْبَعَةُ وَالْعِشْرُونَ شَيْخاً قُدَّامَ الْجَالِسِ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ، وَيَسْجُدُونَ لِلْحَيِّ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ، وَيَطْرَحُونَ أَكَالِيلَهُمْ أَمَامَ الْعَرْشِ قَائِلِينَ:

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “You are worthy, O Lord, To receive glory and honor and power; For You created all things, And by Your will they exist and were created.”
cells.arabic: «أَنْتَ مُسْتَحِقٌّ أَيُّهَا الرَّبُّ أَنْ تَأْخُذَ الْمَجْدَ وَالْكَرَامَةَ وَالْقُدْرَةَ، لأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَ كُلَّ الأَشْيَاءِ، وَهِيَ بِإِرَادَتِكَ كَائِنَةٌ وَخُلِقَتْ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I saw in the right hand of Him who sat on the throne a scroll written inside and on the back, sealed with seven seals.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ عَلَى يَمِينِ الْجَالِسِ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ سِفْراً مَكْتُوباً مِنْ دَاخِلٍ وَمِنْ وَرَاءٍ، مَخْتُوماً بِسَبْعَةِ خُتُومٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I saw a strong angel proclaiming with a loud voice, “Who is worthy to open the scroll and to loose its seals?”
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ مَلاَكاً قَوِيّاً يُنَادِي بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ: «مَنْ هُوَ مُسْتَحِقٌّ أَنْ يَفْتَحَ السِّفْرَ وَيَفُكَّ خُتُومَهُ؟»

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And no one in heaven or on the earth or under the earth was able to open the scroll, or to look at it.
cells.arabic: فَلَمْ يَسْتَطِعْ أَحَدٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَلاَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ وَلاَ تَحْتَ الأَرْضِ أَنْ يَفْتَحَ السِّفْرَ وَلاَ أَنْ يَنْظُرَ إِلَيْهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So I wept much, because no one was found worthy to open and read the scroll, or to look at it.
cells.arabic: فَصِرْتُ أَنَا أَبْكِي كَثِيراً، لأَنَّهُ لَمْ يُوجَدْ أَحَدٌ مُسْتَحِقّاً أَنْ يَفْتَحَ السِّفْرَ وَيَقْرَأَهُ وَلاَ أَنْ يَنْظُرَ إِلَيْهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But one of the elders said to me, “Do not weep. Behold, the Lion of the tribe of Judah, the Root of David, has prevailed to open the scroll and to loose its seven seals.”
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ لِي وَاحِدٌ مِنَ الشُّيُوخِ: «لاَ تَبْكِ. هُوَذَا قَدْ غَلَبَ الأَسَدُ الَّذِي مِنْ سِبْطِ يَهُوذَا، أَصْلُ دَاوُدَ، لِيَفْتَحَ السِّفْرَ وَيَفُكَّ خُتُومَهُ السَّبْعَةَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I looked, and behold, in the midst of the throne and of the four living creatures, and in the midst of the elders, stood a Lamb as though it had been slain, having seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven Spirits of God sent out into all the earth.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ فَإِذَا فِي وَسَطِ الْعَرْشِ وَالْحَيَوَانَاتِ الأَرْبَعَةِ وَفِي وَسَطِ الشُّيُوخِ حَمَلٌ قَائِمٌ كَأَنَّهُ مَذْبُوحٌ، لَهُ سَبْعَةُ قُرُونٍ وَسَبْعُ أَعْيُنٍ، هِيَ سَبْعَةُ أَرْوَاحِ اللهِ الْمُرْسَلَةُ إِلَى كُلِّ الأَرْضِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then He came and took the scroll out of the right hand of Him who sat on the throne.
cells.arabic: فَأَتَى وَأَخَذَ السِّفْرَ مِنْ يَمِينِ الْجَالِسِ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now when He had taken the scroll, the four living creatures and the twenty-four elders fell down before the Lamb, each having a harp, and golden bowls full of incense, which are the prayers of the saints.
cells.arabic: وَلَمَّا أَخَذَ السِّفْرَ خَرَّتِ الأَرْبَعَةُ الْحَيَوَانَاتُ وَالأَرْبَعَةُ وَالْعِشْرُونَ شَيْخاً أَمَامَ الْحَمَلِ، وَلَهُمْ كُلِّ وَاحِدٍ قِيثَارَاتٌ وَجَامَاتٌ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ مَمْلُوَّةٌ بَخُوراً هِيَ صَلَوَاتُ الْقِدِّيسِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they sang a new song, saying: “You are worthy to take the scroll, And to open its seals; For You were slain, And have redeemed us to God by Your blood Out of every tribe and tongue and people and nation,
cells.arabic: وَهُمْ يَتَرَنَّمُونَ تَرْنِيمَةً جَدِيدَةً قَائِلِينَ: «مُسْتَحِقٌّ أَنْتَ أَنْ تَأْخُذَ السِّفْرَ وَتَفْتَحَ خُتُومَهُ، لأَنَّكَ ذُبِحْتَ وَاشْتَرَيْتَنَا لِلَّهِ بِدَمِكَ مِنْ كُلِّ قَبِيلَةٍ وَلِسَانٍ وَشَعْبٍ وَأُمَّةٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And have made us kings and priests to our God; And we shall reign on the earth.”
cells.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَنَا لِإِلَهِنَا مُلُوكاً وَكَهَنَةً، فَسَنَمْلِكُ عَلَى الأَرْضِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I looked, and I heard the voice of many angels around the throne, the living creatures, and the elders; and the number of them was ten thousand times ten thousand, and thousands of thousands,
cells.arabic: وَنَظَرْتُ وَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتَ مَلاَئِكَةٍ كَثِيرِينَ حَوْلَ الْعَرْشِ وَالْحَيَوَانَاتِ وَالشُّيُوخِ، وَكَانَ عَدَدُهُمْ رَبَوَاتِ رَبَوَاتٍ وَأُلُوفَ أُلُوفٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: saying with a loud voice: “Worthy is the Lamb who was slain To receive power and riches and wisdom, And strength and honor and glory and blessing!”
cells.arabic: قَائِلِينَ بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ: «مُسْتَحِقٌّ هُوَ الْحَمَلُ الْمَذْبُوحُ أَنْ يَأْخُذَ الْقُدْرَةَ وَالْغِنَى وَالْحِكْمَةَ وَالْقُوَّةَ وَالْكَرَامَةَ وَالْمَجْدَ وَالْبَرَكَةَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And every creature which is in heaven and on the earth and under the earth and such as are in the sea, and all that are in them, I heard saying: “Blessing and honor and glory and power Be to Him who sits on the throne, And to the Lamb, forever and ever!”
cells.arabic: وَكُلُّ خَلِيقَةٍ مِمَّا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَعَلَى الأَرْضِ وَتَحْتَ الأَرْضِ، وَمَا عَلَى الْبَحْرِ، كُلُّ مَا فِيهَا، سَمِعْتُهَا قَائِلَةً: «لِلْجَالِسِ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ وَلِلْحَمَلِ الْبَرَكَةُ وَالْكَرَامَةُ وَالْمَجْدُ وَالسُّلْطَانُ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the four living creatures said, “Amen!” And the twenty-four elders fell down and worshiped Him who lives forever and ever.
cells.arabic: وَكَانَتِ الْحَيَوَانَاتُ الأَرْبَعَةُ تَقُولُ: «آمِينَ». وَالشُّيُوخُ الأَرْبَعَةُ وَالْعِشْرُونَ خَرُّوا وَسَجَدُوا لِلْحَيِّ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now I saw when the Lamb opened one of the seals; and I heard one of the four living creatures saying with a voice like thunder, “Come and see.”
cells.arabic: وَنَظَرْتُ لَمَّا فَتَحَ الْحَمَلُ وَاحِداً مِنَ الْخُتُومِ السَّبْعَةِ، وَسَمِعْتُ وَاحِداً مِنَ الأَرْبَعَةِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ قَائِلاً كَصَوْتِ رَعْدٍ: «هَلُمَّ وَانْظُرْ!»

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I looked, and behold, a white horse. He who sat on it had a bow; and a crown was given to him, and he went out conquering and to conquer.
cells.arabic: فَنَظَرْتُ، وَإِذَا فَرَسٌ أَبْيَضُ، وَالْجَالِسُ عَلَيْهِ مَعَهُ قَوْسٌ، وَقَدْ أُعْطِيَ إِكْلِيلاً، وَخَرَجَ غَالِباً وَلِكَيْ يَغْلِبَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When He opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature saying, “Come and see.”
cells.arabic: وَلَمَّا فَتَحَ الْخَتْمَ الثَّانِيَ، سَمِعْتُ الْحَيَوَانَ الثَّانِيَ قَائِلاً: «هَلُمَّ وَانْظُرْ!»

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Another horse, fiery red, went out. And it was granted to the one who sat on it to take peace from the earth, and that people should kill one another; and there was given to him a great sword.
cells.arabic: فَخَرَجَ فَرَسٌ آخَرُ أَحْمَرُ، وَأُعْطِيَ لِلْجَالِسِ عَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَنْزِعَ السَّلاَمَ مِنَ الأَرْضِ، وَأَنْ يَقْتُلَ بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضاً، وَأُعْطِيَ سَيْفاً عَظِيماً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When He opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature say, “Come and see.” So I looked, and behold, a black horse, and he who sat on it had a pair of scales in his hand.
cells.arabic: وَلَمَّا فَتَحَ الْخَتْمَ الثَّالِثَ، سَمِعْتُ الْحَيَوَانَ الثَّالِثَ قَائِلاً: «هَلُمَّ وَانْظُرْ!» فَنَظَرْتُ وَإِذَا فَرَسٌ أَسْوَدُ، وَالْجَالِسُ عَلَيْهِ مَعَهُ مِيزَانٌ فِي يَدِهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I heard a voice in the midst of the four living creatures saying, “A quart of wheat for a denarius, and three quarts of barley for a denarius; and do not harm the oil and the wine.”
cells.arabic: وَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً فِي وَسَطِ الأَرْبَعَةِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ قَائِلاً: «ثُمْنِيَّةُ قَمْحٍ بِدِينَارٍ، وَثَلاَثُ ثَمَانِيِّ شَعِيرٍ بِدِينَارٍ. وَأَمَّا الزَّيْتُ وَالْخَمْرُ فَلاَ تَضُرَّهُمَا».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When He opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth living creature saying, “Come and see.”
cells.arabic: وَلَمَّا فَتَحَ الْخَتْمَ الرَّابِعَ، سَمِعْتُ صَوْتَ الْحَيَوَانِ الرَّابِعِ قَائِلاً: «هَلُمَّ وَانْظُرْ!»

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So I looked, and behold, a pale horse. And the name of him who sat on it was Death, and Hades followed with him. And power was given to them over a fourth of the earth, to kill with sword, with hunger, with death, and by the beasts of the earth.
cells.arabic: فَنَظَرْتُ وَإِذَا فَرَسٌ أَخْضَرُ، وَالْجَالِسُ عَلَيْهِ اسْمُهُ الْمَوْتُ، وَالْهَاوِيَةُ تَتْبَعُهُ، وَأُعْطِيَا سُلْطَاناً عَلَى رُبْعِ الأَرْضِ أَنْ يَقْتُلاَ بِالسَّيْفِ وَالْجُوعِ وَالْمَوْتِ وَبِوُحُوشِ الأَرْضِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When He opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of those who had been slain for the word of God and for the testimony which they held.
cells.arabic: وَلَمَّا فَتَحَ الْخَتْمَ الْخَامِسَ، رَأَيْتُ تَحْتَ الْمَذْبَحِ نُفُوسَ الَّذِينَ قُتِلُوا مِنْ أَجْلِ كَلِمَةِ اللهِ وَمِنْ أَجْلِ الشَّهَادَةِ الَّتِي كَانَتْ عِنْدَهُمْ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they cried with a loud voice, saying, “How long, O Lord, holy and true, until You judge and avenge our blood on those who dwell on the earth?”
cells.arabic: وَصَرَخُوا بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ قَائِلِينَ: «حَتَّى مَتَى أَيُّهَا السَّيِّدُ الْقُدُّوسُ وَالْحَقُّ، لاَ تَقْضِي وَتَنْتَقِمُ لِدِمَائِنَا مِنَ السَّاكِنِينَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ؟»

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then a white robe was given to each of them; and it was said to them that they should rest a little while longer, until both the number of their fellow servants and their brethren, who would be killed as they were, was completed.
cells.arabic: فَأُعْطُوا كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ ثِيَاباً بِيضاً، وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنْ يَسْتَرِيحُوا زَمَاناً يَسِيراً أَيْضاً حَتَّى يَكْمَلَ الْعَبِيدُ رُفَقَاؤُهُمْ، وَإِخْوَتُهُمْ أَيْضاً، الْعَتِيدُونَ أَنْ يُقْتَلُوا مِثْلَهُمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I looked when He opened the sixth seal, and behold, there was a great earthquake; and the sun became black as sackcloth of hair, and the moon became like blood.
cells.arabic: وَنَظَرْتُ لَمَّا فَتَحَ الْخَتْمَ السَّادِسَ، وَإِذَا زَلْزَلَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ حَدَثَتْ، وَالشَّمْسُ صَارَتْ سَوْدَاءَ كَمِسْحٍ مِنْ شَعْرٍ، وَالْقَمَرُ صَارَ كَالدَّمِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the stars of heaven fell to the earth, as a fig tree drops its late figs when it is shaken by a mighty wind.
cells.arabic: وَنُجُومُ السَّمَاءِ سَقَطَتْ إِلَى الأَرْضِ كَمَا تَطْرَحُ شَجَرَةُ التِّينِ سُقَاطَهَا إِذَا هَزَّتْهَا رِيحٌ عَظِيمَةٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the sky receded as a scroll when it is rolled up, and every mountain and island was moved out of its place.
cells.arabic: وَالسَّمَاءُ انْفَلَقَتْ كَدَرْجٍ مُلْتَفٍّ، وَكُلُّ جَبَلٍ وَجَزِيرَةٍ تَزَحْزَحَا مِنْ مَوْضِعِهِمَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the kings of the earth, the great men, the rich men, the commanders, the mighty men, every slave and every free man, hid themselves in the caves and in the rocks of the mountains,
cells.arabic: وَمُلُوكُ الأَرْضِ وَالْعُظَمَاءُ وَالأَغْنِيَاءُ وَالأُمَرَاءُ وَالأَقْوِيَاءُ وَكُلُّ عَبْدٍ وَكُلُّ حُرٍّ، أَخْفَوْا أَنْفُسَهُمْ فِي الْمَغَايِرِ وَفِي صُخُورِ الْجِبَالِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and said to the mountains and rocks, “Fall on us and hide us from the face of Him who sits on the throne and from the wrath of the Lamb!
cells.arabic: وَهُمْ يَقُولُونَ لِلْجِبَالِ وَالصُّخُورِ: «اُسْقُطِي عَلَيْنَا وَأَخْفِينَا عَنْ وَجْهِ الْجَالِسِ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ وَعَنْ غَضَبِ الْحَمَلِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For the great day of His wrath has come, and who is able to stand?”
cells.arabic: لأَنَّهُ قَدْ جَاءَ يَوْمُ غَضَبِهِ الْعَظِيمُ. وَمَنْ يَسْتَطِيعُ الْوُقُوفَ؟»

title: Revelation 7
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When He opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.
cells.arabic: وَلَمَّا فَتَحَ الْخَتْمَ السَّابِعَ حَدَثَ سُكُوتٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ نَحْوَ نِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I saw the seven angels who stand before God, and to them were given seven trumpets.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ السَّبْعَةَ الْمَلاَئِكَةَ الَّذِينَ يَقِفُونَ أَمَامَ اللهِ وَقَدْ أُعْطُوا سَبْعَةَ أَبْوَاقٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then another angel, having a golden censer, came and stood at the altar. He was given much incense, that he should offer it with the prayers of all the saints upon the golden altar which was before the throne.
cells.arabic: وَجَاءَ مَلاَكٌ آخَرُ وَوَقَفَ عِنْدَ الْمَذْبَحِ، وَمَعَهُ مِبْخَرَةٌ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ وَأُعْطِيَ بَخُوراً كَثِيراً لِكَيْ يُقَدِّمَهُ مَعَ صَلَوَاتِ الْقِدِّيسِينَ جَمِيعِهِمْ عَلَى مَذْبَحِ الذَّهَبِ الَّذِي أَمَامَ الْعَرْشِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the smoke of the incense, with the prayers of the saints, ascended before God from the angel’s hand.
cells.arabic: فَصَعِدَ دُخَانُ الْبَخُورِ مَعَ صَلَوَاتِ الْقِدِّيسِينَ مِنْ يَدِ الْمَلاَكِ أَمَامَ اللهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the angel took the censer, filled it with fire from the altar, and threw it to the earth. And there were noises, thunderings, lightnings, and an earthquake.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ أَخَذَ الْمَلاَكُ الْمِبْخَرَةَ وَمَلَأَهَا مِنْ نَارِ الْمَذْبَحِ وَأَلْقَاهَا إِلَى الأَرْضِ، فَحَدَثَتْ أَصْوَاتٌ وَرُعُودٌ وَبُرُوقٌ وَزَلْزَلَةٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So the seven angels who had the seven trumpets prepared themselves to sound.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ السَّبْعَةَ الْمَلاَئِكَةَ الَّذِينَ مَعَهُمُ السَّبْعَةُ الأَبْوَاقُ تَهَيَّأُوا لِكَيْ يُبَوِّقُوا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The first angel sounded: And hail and fire followed, mingled with blood, and they were thrown to the earth. And a third of the trees were burned up, and all green grass was burned up.
cells.arabic: فَبَوَّقَ الْمَلاَكُ الأَوَّلُ، فَحَدَثَ بَرَدٌ وَنَارٌ مَخْلُوطَانِ بِدَمٍ، وَأُلْقِيَا إِلَى الأَرْضِ، فَاحْتَرَقَ ثُلْثُ الأَشْجَارِ وَاحْتَرَقَ كُلُّ عُشْبٍ أَخْضَرَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the second angel sounded: And something like a great mountain burning with fire was thrown into the sea, and a third of the sea became blood.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَوَّقَ الْمَلاَكُ الثَّانِي، فَكَأَنَّ جَبَلاً عَظِيماً مُتَّقِداً بِالنَّارِ أُلْقِيَ إِلَى الْبَحْرِ، فَصَارَ ثُلْثُ الْبَحْرِ دَماً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And a third of the living creatures in the sea died, and a third of the ships were destroyed.
cells.arabic: وَمَاتَ ثُلْثُ الْخَلاَئِقِ الَّتِي فِي الْبَحْرِ الَّتِي لَهَا حَيَاةٌ، وَأُهْلِكَ ثُلْثُ السُّفُنِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the third angel sounded: And a great star fell from heaven, burning like a torch, and it fell on a third of the rivers and on the springs of water.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَوَّقَ الْمَلاَكُ الثَّالِثُ، فَسَقَطَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ كَوْكَبٌ عَظِيمٌ مُتَّقِدٌ كَمِصْبَاحٍ، وَوَقَعَ عَلَى ثُلْثِ الأَنْهَارِ وَعَلَى يَنَابِيعِ الْمِيَاهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The name of the star is Wormwood. A third of the waters became wormwood, and many men died from the water, because it was made bitter.
cells.arabic: وَاسْمُ الْكَوْكَبِ «الأَفْسَنْتِينُ». فَصَارَ ثُلْثُ الْمِيَاهِ أَفْسَنْتِيناً، وَمَاتَ كَثِيرُونَ مِنَ النَّاسِ مِنَ الْمِيَاهِ لأَنَّهَا صَارَتْ مُرَّةً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the fourth angel sounded: And a third of the sun was struck, a third of the moon, and a third of the stars, so that a third of them were darkened. A third of the day did not shine, and likewise the night.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَوَّقَ الْمَلاَكُ الرَّابِعُ، فَضُرِبَ ثُلْثُ الشَّمْسِ وَثُلْثُ الْقَمَرِ وَثُلْثُ النُّجُومِ، حَتَّى يُظْلِمَ ثُلْثُهُنَّ، وَالنَّهَارُ لاَ يُضِيءُ ثُلْثُهُ، وَاللَّيْلُ كَذَلِكَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I looked, and I heard an angel flying through the midst of heaven, saying with a loud voice, “Woe, woe, woe to the inhabitants of the earth, because of the remaining blasts of the trumpet of the three angels who are about to sound!”
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ نَظَرْتُ وَسَمِعْتُ مَلاَكاً طَائِراً فِي وَسَطِ السَّمَاءِ قَائِلاً بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ: «وَيْلٌ وَيْلٌ وَيْلٌ لِلسَّاكِنِينَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ مِنْ أَجْلِ بَقِيَّةِ أَصْوَاتِ أَبْوَاقِ الثَّلاَثَةِ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ الْمُزْمِعِينَ أَنْ يُبَوِّقُوا».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the fifth angel sounded: And I saw a star fallen from heaven to the earth. To him was given the key to the bottomless pit.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَوَّقَ الْمَلاَكُ الْخَامِسُ، فَرَأَيْتُ كَوْكَباً قَدْ سَقَطَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ إِلَى الأَرْضِ، وَأُعْطِيَ مِفْتَاحَ بِئْرِ الْهَاوِيَةِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And he opened the bottomless pit, and smoke arose out of the pit like the smoke of a great furnace. So the sun and the air were darkened because of the smoke of the pit.
cells.arabic: فَفَتَحَ بِئْرَ الْهَاوِيَةِ، فَصَعِدَ دُخَانٌ مِنَ الْبِئْرِ كَدُخَانِ أَتُونٍ عَظِيمٍ، فَأَظْلَمَتِ الشَّمْسُ وَالْجَوُّ مِنْ دُخَانِ الْبِئْرِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then out of the smoke locusts came upon the earth. And to them was given power, as the scorpions of the earth have power.
cells.arabic: وَمِنَ الدُّخَانِ خَرَجَ جَرَادٌ عَلَى الأَرْضِ، فَأُعْطِيَ سُلْطَاناً كَمَا لِعَقَارِبِ الأَرْضِ سُلْطَانٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They were commanded not to harm the grass of the earth, or any green thing, or any tree, but only those men who do not have the seal of God on their foreheads.
cells.arabic: وَقِيلَ لَهُ أَنْ لاَ يَضُرَّ عُشْبَ الأَرْضِ وَلاَ شَيْئاً أَخْضَرَ وَلاَ شَجَرَةً مَا، إِلَّا النَّاسَ فَقَطِ الَّذِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُمْ خَتْمُ اللهِ عَلَى جِبَاهِهِمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they were not given authority to kill them, but to torment them for five months. Their torment was like the torment of a scorpion when it strikes a man.
cells.arabic: وَأُعْطِيَ أَنْ لاَ يَقْتُلَهُمْ بَلْ أَنْ يَتَعَذَّبُوا خَمْسَةَ أَشْهُرٍ. وَعَذَابُهُ كَعَذَابِ عَقْرَبٍ إِذَا لَدَغَ إِنْسَاناً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: In those days men will seek death and will not find it; they will desire to die, and death will flee from them.
cells.arabic: وَفِي تِلْكَ الأَيَّامِ سَيَطْلُبُ النَّاسُ الْمَوْتَ وَلاَ يَجِدُونَهُ، وَيَرْغَبُونَ أَنْ يَمُوتُوا فَيَهْرُبُ الْمَوْتُ مِنْهُمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The shape of the locusts was like horses prepared for battle. On their heads were crowns of something like gold, and their faces were like the faces of men.
cells.arabic: وَشَكْلُ الْجَرَادِ شِبْهُ خَيْلٍ مُهَيَّأَةٍ لِلْحَرْبِ، وَعَلَى رُؤُوسِهَا كَأَكَالِيلَ شِبْهِ الذَّهَبِ، وَوُجُوهُهَا كَوُجُوهِ النَّاسِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They had hair like women’s hair, and their teeth were like lions’ teeth.
cells.arabic: وَكَانَ لَهَا شَعْرٌ كَشَعْرِ النِّسَاءِ، وَكَانَتْ أَسْنَانُهَا كَأَسْنَانِ الأُسُودِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they had breastplates like breastplates of iron, and the sound of their wings was like the sound of chariots with many horses running into battle.
cells.arabic: وَكَانَ لَهَا دُرُوعٌ كَدُرُوعٍ مِنْ حَدِيدٍ، وَصَوْتُ أَجْنِحَتِهَا كَصَوْتِ مَرْكَبَاتِ خَيْلٍ كَثِيرَةٍ تَجْرِي إِلَى قِتَالٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They had tails like scorpions, and there were stings in their tails. Their power was to hurt men five months.
cells.arabic: وَلَهَا أَذْنَابٌ شِبْهُ الْعَقَارِبِ، وَكَانَتْ فِي أَذْنَابِهَا حُمَاتٌ، وَسُلْطَانُهَا أَنْ تُؤْذِيَ النَّاسَ خَمْسَةَ أَشْهُرٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they had as king over them the angel of the bottomless pit, whose name in Hebrew is Abaddon, but in Greek he has the name Apollyon.
cells.arabic: وَلَهَا مَلاَكُ الْهَاوِيَةِ مَلِكاً عَلَيْهَا اسْمُهُ بِالْعِبْرَانِيَّةِ «أَبَدُّونَ» وَلَهُ بِالْيُونَانِيَّةِ اسْمُ «أَبُولِّيُّونَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: One woe is past. Behold, still two more woes are coming after these things.
cells.arabic: الْوَيْلُ الْوَاحِدُ مَضَى هُوَذَا يَأْتِي وَيْلاَنِ أَيْضاً بَعْدَ هَذَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the sixth angel sounded: And I heard a voice from the four horns of the golden altar which is before God,
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَوَّقَ الْمَلاَكُ السَّادِسُ، فَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً وَاحِداً مِنْ أَرْبَعَةِ قُرُونِ مَذْبَحِ الذَّهَبِ الَّذِي أَمَامَ اللهِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: saying to the sixth angel who had the trumpet, “Release the four angels who are bound at the great river Euphrates.”
cells.arabic: قَائِلاً لِلْمَلاَكِ السَّادِسِ الَّذِي مَعَهُ الْبُوقُ: «فُكَّ الأَرْبَعَةَ الْمَلاَئِكَةَ الْمُقَيَّدِينَ عِنْدَ النَّهْرِ الْعَظِيمِ الْفُرَاتِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So the four angels, who had been prepared for the hour and day and month and year, were released to kill a third of mankind.
cells.arabic: فَانْفَكَّ الأَرْبَعَةُ الْمَلاَئِكَةُ الْمُعَدُّونَ لِلسَّاعَةِ وَالْيَوْمِ وَالشَّهْرِ وَالسَّنَةِ، لِكَيْ يَقْتُلُوا ثُلْثَ النَّاسِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now the number of the army of the horsemen was two hundred million; I heard the number of them.
cells.arabic: وَعَدَدُ جُيُوشِ الْفُرْسَانِ مِئَتَا مِلْيُونٍ. وَأَنَا سَمِعْتُ عَدَدَهُمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And thus I saw the horses in the vision: those who sat on them had breastplates of fiery red, hyacinth blue, and sulfur yellow; and the heads of the horses were like the heads of lions; and out of their mouths came fire, smoke, and brimstone.
cells.arabic: وَهَكَذَا رَأَيْتُ الْخَيْلَ فِي الرُّؤْيَا وَالْجَالِسِينَ عَلَيْهَا، لَهُمْ دُرُوعٌ نَارِيَّةٌ وَأَسْمَانْجُونِيَّةٌ وَكِبْرِيتِيَّةٌ، وَرُؤُوسُ الْخَيْلِ كَرُؤُوسِ الأُسُودِ، وَمِنْ أَفْوَاهِهَا يَخْرُجُ نَارٌ وَدُخَانٌ وَكِبْرِيتٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: By these three plagues a third of mankind was killed—by the fire and the smoke and the brimstone which came out of their mouths.
cells.arabic: مِنْ هَذِهِ الثَّلاَثَةِ قُتِلَ ثُلْثُ النَّاسِ مِنَ النَّارِ وَالدُّخَانِ وَالْكِبْرِيتِ الْخَارِجَةِ مِنْ أَفْوَاهِهَا،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For their power is in their mouth and in their tails; for their tails are like serpents, having heads; and with them they do harm.
cells.arabic: فَإِنَّ سُلْطَانَهَا هُوَ فِي أَفْوَاهِهَا وَفِي أَذْنَابِهَا، لأَنَّ أَذْنَابَهَا شِبْهُ الْحَيَّاتِ وَلَهَا رُؤُوسٌ وَبِهَا تَضُرُّ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But the rest of mankind, who were not killed by these plagues, did not repent of the works of their hands, that they should not worship demons, and idols of gold, silver, brass, stone, and wood, which can neither see nor hear nor walk.
cells.arabic: وَأَمَّا بَقِيَّةُ النَّاسِ الَّذِينَ لَمْ يُقْتَلُوا بِهَذِهِ الضَّرَبَاتِ فَلَمْ يَتُوبُوا عَنْ أَعْمَالِ أَيْدِيهِمْ، حَتَّى لاَ يَسْجُدُوا لِلشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَصْنَامِ الذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ وَالنُّحَاسِ وَالْحَجَرِ وَالْخَشَبِ الَّتِي لاَ تَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ تُبْصِرَ وَلاَ تَسْمَعَ وَلاَ تَمْشِيَ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they did not repent of their murders or their sorceries or their sexual immorality or their thefts.
cells.arabic: وَلاَ تَابُوا عَنْ قَتْلِهِمْ وَلاَ عَنْ سِحْرِهِمْ وَلاَ عَنْ زِنَاهُمْ وَلاَ عَنْ سِرْقَتِهِمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I saw still another mighty angel coming down from heaven, clothed with a cloud. And a rainbow was on his head, his face was like the sun, and his feet like pillars of fire.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ رَأَيْتُ مَلاَكاً آخَرَ قَوِيّاً نَازِلاً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ، مُتَسَرْبِلاً بِسَحَابَةٍ، وَعَلَى رَأْسِهِ قَوْسُ قُزَحَ، وَوَجْهُهُ كَالشَّمْسِ، وَرِجْلاَهُ كَعَمُودَيْ نَارٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He had a little book open in his hand. And he set his right foot on the sea and his left foot on the land,
cells.arabic: وَمَعَهُ فِي يَدِهِ سِفْرٌ صَغِيرٌ مَفْتُوحٌ. فَوَضَعَ رِجْلَهُ الْيُمْنَى عَلَى الْبَحْرِ وَالْيُسْرَى عَلَى الأَرْضِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and cried with a loud voice, as when a lion roars. When he cried out, seven thunders uttered their voices.
cells.arabic: وَصَرَخَ بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ كَمَا يُزَمْجِرُ الأَسَدُ. وَبَعْدَ مَا صَرَخَ تَكَلَّمَتِ الرُّعُودُ السَّبْعَةُ بِأَصْوَاتِهَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now when the seven thunders uttered their voices, I was about to write; but I heard a voice from heaven saying to me, “Seal up the things which the seven thunders uttered, and do not write them.”
cells.arabic: وَبَعْدَ مَا تَكَلَّمَتِ الرُّعُودُ السَّبْعَةُ بِأَصْوَاتِهَا كُنْتُ مُزْمِعاً أَنْ أَكْتُبَ، فَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ قَائِلاً لِيَ: «اخْتِمْ عَلَى مَا تَكَلَّمَتْ بِهِ الرُّعُودُ السَّبْعَةُ وَلاَ تَكْتُبْهُ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The angel whom I saw standing on the sea and on the land raised up his hand to heaven
cells.arabic: وَالْمَلاَكُ الَّذِي رَأَيْتُهُ وَاقِفاً عَلَى الْبَحْرِ وَعَلَى الأَرْضِ، رَفَعَ يَدَهُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and swore by Him who lives forever and ever, who created heaven and the things that are in it, the earth and the things that are in it, and the sea and the things that are in it, that there should be delay no longer,
cells.arabic: وَأَقْسَمَ بِالْحَيِّ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ، الَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَاءَ وَمَا فِيهَا وَالأَرْضَ وَمَا فِيهَا وَالْبَحْرَ وَمَا فِيهِ، أَنْ لاَ يَكُونُ زَمَانٌ بَعْدُ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: but in the days of the sounding of the seventh angel, when he is about to sound, the mystery of God would be finished, as He declared to His servants the prophets.
cells.arabic: بَلْ فِي أَيَّامِ صَوْتِ الْمَلاَكِ السَّابِعِ مَتَى أَزْمَعَ أَنْ يُبَوِّقَ يَتِمُّ أَيْضاً سِرُّ اللهِ، كَمَا بَشَّرَ عَبِيدَهُ الأَنْبِيَاءَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the voice which I heard from heaven spoke to me again and said, “Go, take the little book which is open in the hand of the angel who stands on the sea and on the earth.”
cells.arabic: وَالصَّوْتُ الَّذِي كُنْتُ قَدْ سَمِعْتُهُ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ كَلَّمَنِي أَيْضاً وَقَالَ: «اذْهَبْ خُذِ السِّفْرَ الصَّغِيرَ الْمَفْتُوحَ فِي يَدِ الْمَلاَكِ الْوَاقِفِ عَلَى الْبَحْرِ وَعَلَى الأَرْضِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So I went to the angel and said to him, “Give me the little book.” And he said to me, “Take and eat it; and it will make your stomach bitter, but it will be as sweet as honey in your mouth.”
cells.arabic: فَذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الْمَلاَكِ قَائِلاً لَهُ: «أَعْطِنِي السِّفْرَ الصَّغِيرَ». فَقَالَ لِي: «خُذْهُ وَكُلْهُ، فَسَيَجْعَلُ جَوْفَكَ مُرّاً، وَلَكِنَّهُ فِي فَمِكَ يَكُونُ حُلْواً كَالْعَسَلِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I took the little book out of the angel’s hand and ate it, and it was as sweet as honey in my mouth. But when I had eaten it, my stomach became bitter.
cells.arabic: فَأَخَذْتُ السِّفْرَ الصَّغِيرَ مِنْ يَدِ الْمَلاَكِ وَأَكَلْتُهُ، فَكَانَ فِي فَمِي حُلْواً كَالْعَسَلِ. وَبَعْدَ مَا أَكَلْتُهُ صَارَ جَوْفِي مُرّاً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And he said to me, “You must prophesy again about many peoples, nations, tongues, and kings.”
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ لِي: «يَجِبُ أَنَّكَ تَتَنَبَّأُ أَيْضاً عَلَى شُعُوبٍ وَأُمَمٍ وَأَلْسِنَةٍ وَمُلُوكٍ كَثِيرِينَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I was given a reed like a measuring rod. And the angel stood, saying, “Rise and measure the temple of God, the altar, and those who worship there.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ أُعْطِيتُ قَصَبَةً شِبْهَ عَصاً، وَوَقَفَ الْمَلاَكُ قَائِلاً لِي: «قُمْ وَقِسْ هَيْكَلَ اللهِ وَالْمَذْبَحَ وَالسَّاجِدِينَ فِيهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But leave out the court which is outside the temple, and do not measure it, for it has been given to the Gentiles. And they will tread the holy city underfoot for forty-two months.
cells.arabic: وَأَمَّا الدَّارُ الَّتِي هِيَ خَارِجَ الْهَيْكَلِ فَاطْرَحْهَا خَارِجاً وَلاَ تَقِسْهَا، لأَنَّهَا قَدْ أُعْطِيَتْ لِلأُمَمِ، وَسَيَدُوسُونَ الْمَدِينَةَ الْمُقَدَّسَةَ اثْنَيْنِ وَأَرْبَعِينَ شَهْراً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I will give power to my two witnesses, and they will prophesy one thousand two hundred and sixty days, clothed in sackcloth.”
cells.arabic: وَسَأُعْطِي لِشَاهِدَيَّ فَيَتَنَبَّآنِ أَلْفاً وَمِئَتَيْنِ وَسِتِّينَ يَوْماً، لاَبِسَيْنِ مُسُوحاً».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: These are the two olive trees and the two lampstands standing before the God of the earth.
cells.arabic: هَذَانِ هُمَا الزَّيْتُونَتَانِ وَالْمَنَارَتَانِ الْقَائِمَتَانِ أَمَامِ رَبِّ الأَرْضِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And if anyone wants to harm them, fire proceeds from their mouth and devours their enemies. And if anyone wants to harm them, he must be killed in this manner.
cells.arabic: وَإِنْ كَانَ أَحَدٌ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُؤْذِيَهُمَا، تَخْرُجُ نَارٌ مِنْ فَمِهِمَا وَتَأْكُلُ أَعْدَاءَهُمَا. وَإِنْ كَانَ أَحَدٌ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُؤْذِيَهُمَا فَهَكَذَا لاَ بُدَّ أَنَّهُ يُقْتَلُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: These have power to shut heaven, so that no rain falls in the days of their prophecy; and they have power over waters to turn them to blood, and to strike the earth with all plagues, as often as they desire.
cells.arabic: هَذَانِ لَهُمَا السُّلْطَانُ أَنْ يُغْلِقَا السَّمَاءَ حَتَّى لاَ تُمْطِرَ مَطَراً فِي أَيَّامِ نُبُوَّتِهِمَا، وَلَهُمَا سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الْمِيَاهِ أَنْ يُحَوِّلاَهَا إِلَى دَمٍ، وَأَنْ يَضْرِبَا الأَرْضَ بِكُلِّ ضَرْبَةٍ كُلَّمَا أَرَادَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When they finish their testimony, the beast that ascends out of the bottomless pit will make war against them, overcome them, and kill them.
cells.arabic: وَمَتَى تَمَّمَا شَهَادَتَهُمَا فَالْوَحْشُ الصَّاعِدُ مِنَ الْهَاوِيَةِ سَيَصْنَعُ مَعَهُمَا حَرْباً وَيَغْلِبُهُمَا وَيَقْتُلُهُمَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And their dead bodies will lie in the street of the great city which spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt, where also our Lord was crucified.
cells.arabic: وَتَكُونُ جُثَّتَاهُمَا عَلَى شَارِعِ الْمَدِينَةِ الْعَظِيمَةِ الَّتِي تُدْعَى رُوحِيّاً سَدُومَ وَمِصْرَ، حَيْثُ صُلِبَ رَبُّنَا أَيْضاً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then those from the peoples, tribes, tongues, and nations will see their dead bodies three-and-a-half days, and not allow their dead bodies to be put into graves.
cells.arabic: وَيَنْظُرُ أُنَاسٌ مِنَ الشُّعُوبِ وَالْقَبَائِلِ وَالأَلْسِنَةِ وَالأُمَمِ جُثَّتَيْهِمَا ثَلاَثَةَ أَيَّامٍ وَنِصْفاً، وَلاَ يَدَعُونَ جُثَّتَيْهِمَا تُوضَعَانِ فِي قُبُورٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And those who dwell on the earth will rejoice over them, make merry, and send gifts to one another, because these two prophets tormented those who dwell on the earth.
cells.arabic: وَيَشْمَتُ بِهِمَا السَّاكِنُونَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ وَيَتَهَلَّلُونَ، وَيُرْسِلُونَ هَدَايَا بَعْضُهُمْ لِبَعْضٍ لأَنَّ هَذَيْنِ النَّبِيَّيْنِ كَانَا قَدْ عَذَّبَا السَّاكِنِينَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now after the three-and-a-half days the breath of life from God entered them, and they stood on their feet, and great fear fell on those who saw them.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَعْدَ الثَّلاَثَةِ الأَيَّامِ وَالنِّصْفِ دَخَلَ فِيهِمَا رُوحُ حَيَاةٍ مِنَ اللهِ، فَوَقَفَا عَلَى أَرْجُلِهِمَا. وَوَقَعَ خَوْفٌ عَظِيمٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ كَانُوا يَنْظُرُونَهُمَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they heard a loud voice from heaven saying to them, “Come up here.” And they ascended to heaven in a cloud, and their enemies saw them.
cells.arabic: وَسَمِعُوا صَوْتاً عَظِيماً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ قَائِلاً لَهُمَا: «اصْعَدَا إِلَى هَهُنَا». فَصَعِدَا إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فِي السَّحَابَةِ، وَنَظَرَهُمَا أَعْدَاؤُهُمَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: In the same hour there was a great earthquake, and a tenth of the city fell. In the earthquake seven thousand people were killed, and the rest were afraid and gave glory to the God of heaven.
cells.arabic: وَفِي تِلْكَ السَّاعَةِ حَدَثَتْ زَلْزَلَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ، فَسَقَطَ عُشْرُ الْمَدِينَةِ، وَقُتِلَ بِالزَّلْزَلَةِ أَسْمَاءٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ: سَبْعَةُ آلاَفٍ. وَصَارَ الْبَاقُونَ فِي رُعْبَةٍ، وَأَعْطُوا مَجْداً لِإِلَهِ السَّمَاءِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The second woe is past. Behold, the third woe is coming quickly.
cells.arabic: الْوَيْلُ الثَّانِي مَضَى وَهُوَذَا الْوَيْلُ الثَّالِثُ يَأْتِي سَرِيعاً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the seventh angel sounded: And there were loud voices in heaven, saying, “The kingdoms of this world have become the kingdoms of our Lord and of His Christ, and He shall reign forever and ever!”
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَوَّقَ الْمَلاَكُ السَّابِعُ، فَحَدَثَتْ أَصْوَاتٌ عَظِيمَةٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ قَائِلَةً: «قَدْ صَارَتْ مَمَالِكُ الْعَالَمِ لِرَبِّنَا وَمَسِيحِهِ، فَسَيَمْلِكُ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the twenty-four elders who sat before God on their thrones fell on their faces and worshiped God,
cells.arabic: وَالأَرْبَعَةُ وَالْعِشْرُونَ شَيْخاً الْجَالِسُونَ أَمَامَ اللهِ عَلَى عُرُوشِهِمْ خَرُّوا عَلَى وُجُوهِهِمْ وَسَجَدُوا لِلَّهِ

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: saying: “We give You thanks, O Lord God Almighty, The One who is and who was and who is to come, Because You have taken Your great power and reigned.
cells.arabic: قَائِلِينَ: «نَشْكُرُكَ أَيُّهَا الرَّبُّ الْإِلَهُ الْقَادِرُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، الْكَائِنُ وَالَّذِي كَانَ وَالَّذِي يَأْتِي، لأَنَّكَ أَخَذْتَ قُدْرَتَكَ الْعَظِيمَةَ وَمَلَكْتَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The nations were angry, and Your wrath has come, And the time of the dead, that they should be judged, And that You should reward Your servants the prophets and the saints, And those who fear Your name, small and great, And should destroy those who destroy the earth.”
cells.arabic: وَغَضِبَتِ الأُمَمُ فَأَتَى غَضَبُكَ وَزَمَانُ الأَمْوَاتِ لِيُدَانُوا، وَلِتُعْطَى الأُجْرَةُ لِعَبِيدِكَ الأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْقِدِّيسِينَ وَالْخَائِفِينَ اسْمَكَ، الصِّغَارِ وَالْكِبَارِ، وَلِيُهْلَكَ الَّذِينَ كَانُوا يُهْلِكُونَ الأَرْضَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the temple of God was opened in heaven, and the ark of His covenant was seen in His temple. And there were lightnings, noises, thunderings, an earthquake, and great hail.
cells.arabic: وَانْفَتَحَ هَيْكَلُ اللهِ فِي السَّمَاءِ، وَظَهَرَ تَابُوتُ عَهْدِهِ فِي هَيْكَلِهِ، وَحَدَثَتْ بُرُوقٌ وَأَصْوَاتٌ وَرُعُودٌ وَزَلْزَلَةٌ وَبَرَدٌ عَظِيمٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now a great sign appeared in heaven: a woman clothed with the sun, with the moon under her feet, and on her head a garland of twelve stars.
cells.arabic: وَظَهَرَتْ آيَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ: امْرَأَةٌ مُتَسَرْبِلَةٌ بِالشَّمْسِ، وَالْقَمَرُ تَحْتَ رِجْلَيْهَا، وَعَلَى رَأْسِهَا إِكْلِيلٌ مِنِ اثْنَيْ عَشَرَ كَوْكَباً،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then being with child, she cried out in labor and in pain to give birth.
cells.arabic: وَهِيَ حُبْلَى تَصْرُخُ مُتَمَخِّضَةً وَمُتَوَجِّعَةً لِتَلِدَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And another sign appeared in heaven: behold, a great, fiery red dragon having seven heads and ten horns, and seven diadems on his heads.
cells.arabic: وَظَهَرَتْ آيَةٌ أُخْرَى فِي السَّمَاءِ: هُوَذَا تِنِّينٌ عَظِيمٌ أَحْمَرُ لَهُ سَبْعَةُ رُؤُوسٍ وَعَشَرَةُ قُرُونٍ، وَعَلَى رُؤُوسِهِ سَبْعَةُ تِيجَانٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: His tail drew a third of the stars of heaven and threw them to the earth. And the dragon stood before the woman who was ready to give birth, to devour her Child as soon as it was born.
cells.arabic: وَذَنَبُهُ يَجُرُّ ثُلْثَ نُجُومِ السَّمَاءِ فَطَرَحَهَا إِلَى الأَرْضِ. وَالتِّنِّينُ وَقَفَ أَمَامَ الْمَرْأَةِ الْعَتِيدَةِ أَنْ تَلِدَ حَتَّى يَبْتَلِعَ وَلَدَهَا مَتَى وَلَدَتْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: She bore a male Child who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron. And her Child was caught up to God and His throne.
cells.arabic: فَوَلَدَتِ ابْناً ذَكَراً عَتِيداً أَنْ يَرْعَى جَمِيعَ الأُمَمِ بِعَصاً مِنْ حَدِيدٍ. وَاخْتُطِفَ وَلَدُهَا إِلَى اللهِ وَإِلَى عَرْشِهِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the woman fled into the wilderness, where she has a place prepared by God, that they should feed her there one thousand two hundred and sixty days.
cells.arabic: وَالْمَرْأَةُ هَرَبَتْ إِلَى الْبَرِّيَّةِ حَيْثُ لَهَا مَوْضِعٌ مُعَدٌّ مِنَ اللهِ لِكَيْ يَعُولُوهَا هُنَاكَ أَلْفاً وَمِئَتَيْنِ وَسِتِّينَ يَوْماً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And war broke out in heaven: Michael and his angels fought with the dragon; and the dragon and his angels fought,
cells.arabic: وَحَدَثَتْ حَرْبٌ فِي السَّمَاءِ: مِيخَائِيلُ وَمَلاَئِكَتُهُ حَارَبُوا التِّنِّينَ. وَحَارَبَ التِّنِّينُ وَمَلاَئِكَتُهُ

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: but they did not prevail, nor was a place found for them in heaven any longer.
cells.arabic: وَلَمْ يَقْوُوا، فَلَمْ يُوجَدْ مَكَانُهُمْ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ فِي السَّمَاءِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So the great dragon was cast out, that serpent of old, called the Devil and Satan, who deceives the whole world; he was cast to the earth, and his angels were cast out with him.
cells.arabic: فَطُرِحَ التِّنِّينُ الْعَظِيمُ، الْحَيَّةُ الْقَدِيمَةُ الْمَدْعُوُّ إِبْلِيسَ وَالشَّيْطَانَ، الَّذِي يُضِلُّ الْعَالَمَ كُلَّهُ - طُرِحَ إِلَى الأَرْضِ، وَطُرِحَتْ مَعَهُ مَلاَئِكَتُهُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, “Now salvation, and strength, and the kingdom of our God, and the power of His Christ have come, for the accuser of our brethren, who accused them before our God day and night, has been cast down.
cells.arabic: وَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً عَظِيماً قَائِلاً فِي السَّمَاءِ: «الآنَ صَارَ خَلاَصُ إِلَهِنَا وَقُدْرَتُهُ وَمُلْكُهُ وَسُلْطَانُ مَسِيحِهِ، لأَنَّهُ قَدْ طُرِحَ الْمُشْتَكِي عَلَى إِخْوَتِنَا الَّذِي كَانَ يَشْتَكِي عَلَيْهِمْ أَمَامَ إِلَهِنَا نَهَاراً وَلَيْلاً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of their testimony, and they did not love their lives to the death.
cells.arabic: وَهُمْ غَلَبُوهُ بِدَمِ الْحَمَلِ وَبِكَلِمَةِ شَهَادَتِهِمْ، وَلَمْ يُحِبُّوا حَيَاتَهُمْ حَتَّى الْمَوْتِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Therefore rejoice, O heavens, and you who dwell in them! Woe to the inhabitants of the earth and the sea! For the devil has come down to you, having great wrath, because he knows that he has a short time.”
cells.arabic: مِنْ أَجْلِ هَذَا افْرَحِي أَيَّتُهَا السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالسَّاكِنُونَ فِيهَا. وَيْلٌ لِسَاكِنِي الأَرْضِ وَالْبَحْرِ، لأَنَّ إِبْلِيسَ نَزَلَ إِلَيْكُمْ وَبِهِ غَضَبٌ عَظِيمٌ، عَالِماً أَنَّ لَهُ زَمَاناً قَلِيلاً».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now when the dragon saw that he had been cast to the earth, he persecuted the woman who gave birth to the male Child.
cells.arabic: وَلَمَّا رَأَى التِّنِّينُ أَنَّهُ طُرِحَ إِلَى الأَرْضِ، اضْطَهَدَ الْمَرْأَةَ الَّتِي وَلَدَتْ الاِبْنَ الذَّكَرَ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But the woman was given two wings of a great eagle, that she might fly into the wilderness to her place, where she is nourished for a time and times and half a time, from the presence of the serpent.
cells.arabic: فَأُعْطِيَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ جَنَاحَيِ النَّسْرِ الْعَظِيمِ لِكَيْ تَطِيرَ إِلَى الْبَرِّيَّةِ إِلَى مَوْضِعِهَا، حَيْثُ تُعَالُ زَمَاناً وَزَمَانَيْنِ وَنِصْفَ زَمَانٍ مِنْ وَجْهِ الْحَيَّةِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So the serpent spewed water out of his mouth like a flood after the woman, that he might cause her to be carried away by the flood.
cells.arabic: فَأَلْقَتِ الْحَيَّةُ مِنْ فَمِهَا وَرَاءَ الْمَرْأَةِ مَاءً كَنَهْرٍ لِتَجْعَلَهَا تُحْمَلُ بِالنَّهْرِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened its mouth and swallowed up the flood which the dragon had spewed out of his mouth.
cells.arabic: فَأَعَانَتِ الأَرْضُ الْمَرْأَةَ وَفَتَحَتِ الأَرْضُ فَمَهَا وَابْتَلَعَتِ النَّهْرَ الَّذِي أَلْقَاهُ التِّنِّينُ مِنْ فَمِهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the dragon was enraged with the woman, and he went to make war with the rest of her offspring, who keep the commandments of God and have the testimony of Jesus Christ.
cells.arabic: فَغَضِبَ التِّنِّينُ عَلَى الْمَرْأَةِ، وَذَهَبَ لِيَصْنَعَ حَرْباً مَعَ بَاقِي نَسْلِهَا الَّذِينَ يَحْفَظُونَ وَصَايَا اللهِ، وَعِنْدَهُمْ شَهَادَةُ يَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I stood on the sand of the sea. And I saw a beast rising up out of the sea, having seven heads and ten horns, and on his horns ten crowns, and on his heads a blasphemous name.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ وَقَفْتُ عَلَى رَمْلِ الْبَحْرِ، فَرَأَيْتُ وَحْشاً طَالِعاً مِنَ الْبَحْرِ لَهُ سَبْعَةُ رُؤُوسٍ وَعَشَرَةُ قُرُونٍ، وَعَلَى قُرُونِهِ عَشَرَةُ تِيجَانٍ، وَعَلَى رُؤُوسِهِ اسْمُ تَجْدِيفٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now the beast which I saw was like a leopard, his feet were like the feet of a bear, and his mouth like the mouth of a lion. The dragon gave him his power, his throne, and great authority.
cells.arabic: وَالْوَحْشُ الَّذِي رَأَيْتُهُ كَانَ شِبْهَ نَمِرٍ، وَقَوَائِمُهُ كَقَوَائِمِ دُبٍّ، وَفَمُهُ كَفَمِ أَسَدٍ. وَأَعْطَاهُ التِّنِّينُ قُدْرَتَهُ وَعَرْشَهُ وَسُلْطَاناً عَظِيماً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I saw one of his heads as if it had been mortally wounded, and his deadly wound was healed. And all the world marveled and followed the beast.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ وَاحِداً مِنْ رُؤُوسِهِ كَأَنَّهُ مَذْبُوحٌ لِلْمَوْتِ، وَجُرْحُهُ الْمُمِيتُ قَدْ شُفِيَ. وَتَعَجَّبَتْ كُلُّ الأَرْضِ وَرَاءَ الْوَحْشِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So they worshiped the dragon who gave authority to the beast; and they worshiped the beast, saying, “Who is like the beast? Who is able to make war with him?”
cells.arabic: وَسَجَدُوا لِلتِّنِّينِ الَّذِي أَعْطَى السُّلْطَانَ لِلْوَحْشِ، وَسَجَدُوا لِلْوَحْشِ قَائِلِينَ: «مَنْ هُوَ مِثْلُ الْوَحْشِ؟ مَنْ يَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ يُحَارِبَهُ؟»

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And he was given a mouth speaking great things and blasphemies, and he was given authority to continue for forty-two months.
cells.arabic: وَأُعْطِيَ فَماً يَتَكَلَّمُ بِعَظَائِمَ وَتَجَادِيفَ، وَأُعْطِيَ سُلْطَاناً أَنْ يَفْعَلَ اثْنَيْنِ وَأَرْبَعِينَ شَهْراً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then he opened his mouth in blasphemy against God, to blaspheme His name, His tabernacle, and those who dwell in heaven.
cells.arabic: فَفَتَحَ فَمَهُ بِالتَّجْدِيفِ عَلَى اللهِ، لِيُجَدِّفَ عَلَى اسْمِهِ وَعَلَى مَسْكَنِهِ وَعَلَى السَّاكِنِينَ فِي السَّمَاءِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: It was granted to him to make war with the saints and to overcome them. And authority was given him over every tribe, tongue, and nation.
cells.arabic: وَأُعْطِيَ أَنْ يَصْنَعَ حَرْباً مَعَ الْقِدِّيسِينَ وَيَغْلِبَهُمْ، وَأُعْطِيَ سُلْطَاناً عَلَى كُلِّ قَبِيلَةٍ وَلِسَانٍ وَأُمَّةٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: All who dwell on the earth will worship him, whose names have not been written in the Book of Life of the Lamb slain from the foundation of the world.
cells.arabic: فَسَيَسْجُدُ لَهُ جَمِيعُ السَّاكِنِينَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ، الَّذِينَ لَيْسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُهُمْ مَكْتُوبَةً مُنْذُ تَأْسِيسِ الْعَالَمِ فِي سِفْرِ حَيَاةِ الْحَمَلِ الَّذِي ذُبِحَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: If anyone has an ear, let him hear.
cells.arabic: مَنْ لَهُ أُذُنٌ فَلْيَسْمَعْ!

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He who leads into captivity shall go into captivity; he who kills with the sword must be killed with the sword. Here is the patience and the faith of the saints.
cells.arabic: إِنْ كَانَ أَحَدٌ يَجْمَعُ سَبْياً فَإِلَى السَّبْيِ يَذْهَبُ. وَإِنْ كَانَ أَحَدٌ يَقْتُلُ بِالسَّيْفِ فَيَنْبَغِي أَنْ يُقْتَلَ بِالسَّيْفِ. هُنَا صَبْرُ الْقِدِّيسِينَ وَإِيمَانُهُمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I saw another beast coming up out of the earth, and he had two horns like a lamb and spoke like a dragon.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ رَأَيْتُ وَحْشاً آخَرَ طَالِعاً مِنَ الأَرْضِ، وَكَانَ لَهُ قَرْنَانِ شِبْهُ خَرُوفٍ، وَكَانَ يَتَكَلَّمُ كَتِنِّينٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And he exercises all the authority of the first beast in his presence, and causes the earth and those who dwell in it to worship the first beast, whose deadly wound was healed.
cells.arabic: وَيَعْمَلُ بِكُلِّ سُلْطَانِ الْوَحْشِ الأَوَّلِ أَمَامَهُ، وَيَجْعَلُ الأَرْضَ وَالسَّاكِنِينَ فِيهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلْوَحْشِ الأَوَّلِ الَّذِي شُفِيَ جُرْحُهُ الْمُمِيتُ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He performs great signs, so that he even makes fire come down from heaven on the earth in the sight of men.
cells.arabic: وَيَصْنَعُ آيَاتٍ عَظِيمَةً، حَتَّى إِنَّهُ يَجْعَلُ نَاراً تَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ عَلَى الأَرْضِ قُدَّامَ النَّاسِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits
