cells.english: And he deceives those who dwell on the earth by those signs which he was granted to do in the sight of the beast, telling those who dwell on the earth to make an image to the beast who was wounded by the sword and lived.
cells.arabic: وَيُضِلُّ السَّاكِنِينَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ بِالآيَاتِ الَّتِي أُعْطِيَ أَنْ يَصْنَعَهَا أَمَامَ الْوَحْشِ، قَائِلاً لِلسَّاكِنِينَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ أَنْ يَصْنَعُوا صُورَةً لِلْوَحْشِ الَّذِي كَانَ بِهِ جُرْحُ السَّيْفِ وَعَاشَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He was granted power to give breath to the image of the beast, that the image of the beast should both speak and cause as many as would not worship the image of the beast to be killed.
cells.arabic: وَأُعْطِيَ أَنْ يُعْطِيَ رُوحاً لِصُورَةِ الْوَحْشِ، حَتَّى تَتَكَلَّمَ صُورَةُ الْوَحْشِ وَيَجْعَلَ جَمِيعَ الَّذِينَ لاَ يَسْجُدُونَ لِصُورَةِ الْوَحْشِ يُقْتَلُونَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He causes all, both small and great, rich and poor, free and slave, to receive a mark on their right hand or on their foreheads,
cells.arabic: وَيَجْعَلَ الْجَمِيعَ: الصِّغَارَ وَالْكِبَارَ، وَالأَغْنِيَاءَ وَالْفُقَرَاءَ، وَالأَحْرَارَ وَالْعَبِيدَ، تُصْنَعُ لَهُمْ سِمَةٌ عَلَى يَدِهِمِ الْيُمْنَى أَوْ عَلَى جِبْهَتِهِمْ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and that no one may buy or sell except one who has the mark or the name of the beast, or the number of his name.
cells.arabic: وَأَنْ لاَ يَقْدِرَ أَحَدٌ أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ أَوْ يَبِيعَ إِلَّا مَنْ لَهُ السِّمَةُ أَوِ اسْمُ الْوَحْشِ أَوْ عَدَدُ اسْمِهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Here is wisdom. Let him who has understanding calculate the number of the beast, for it is the number of a man: His number is 666.
cells.arabic: هُنَا الْحِكْمَةُ! مَنْ لَهُ فَهْمٌ فَلْيَحْسِبْ عَدَدَ الْوَحْشِ فَإِنَّهُ عَدَدُ إِنْسَانٍ، وَعَدَدُهُ: سِتُّ مِئَةٍ وَسِتَّةٌ وَسِتُّونَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I looked, and behold, a Lamb standing on Mount Zion, and with Him one hundred and forty-four thousand, having His Father’s name written on their foreheads.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ نَظَرْتُ وَإِذَا حَمَلٌ وَاقِفٌ عَلَى جَبَلِ صِهْيَوْنَ، وَمَعَهُ مِئَةٌ وَأَرْبَعَةٌ وَأَرْبَعُونَ أَلْفاً، لَهُمُ اسْمُ أَبِيهِ مَكْتُوباً عَلَى جِبَاهِهِمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I heard a voice from heaven, like the voice of many waters, and like the voice of loud thunder. And I heard the sound of harpists playing their harps.
cells.arabic: وَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ كَصَوْتِ مِيَاهٍ كَثِيرَةٍ وَكَصَوْتِ رَعْدٍ عَظِيمٍ. وَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً كَصَوْتِ ضَارِبِينَ بِالْقِيثَارَةِ يَضْرِبُونَ بِقِيثَارَاتِهِمْ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They sang as it were a new song before the throne, before the four living creatures, and the elders; and no one could learn that song except the hundred and forty-four thousand who were redeemed from the earth.
cells.arabic: وَهُمْ يَتَرَنَّمُونَ كَتَرْنِيمَةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ أَمَامَ الْعَرْشِ وَأَمَامَ الأَرْبَعَةِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ وَالشُّيُوخِ. وَلَمْ يَسْتَطِعْ أَحَدٌ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ التَّرْنِيمَةَ إِلَّا الْمِئَةُ وَالأَرْبَعَةُ وَالأَرْبَعُونَ أَلْفاً الَّذِينَ اشْتُرُوا مِنَ الأَرْضِ -

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: These are the ones who were not defiled with women, for they are virgins. These are the ones who follow the Lamb wherever He goes. These were redeemed from among men, being firstfruits to God and to the Lamb.
cells.arabic: هَؤُلاَءِ هُمُ الَّذِينَ لَمْ يَتَنَجَّسُوا مَعَ النِّسَاءِ لأَنَّهُمْ أَطْهَارٌ. هَؤُلاَءِ هُمُ الَّذِينَ يَتْبَعُونَ الْحَمَلَ حَيْثُمَا ذَهَبَ. هَؤُلاَءِ اشْتُرُوا مِنْ بَيْنِ النَّاسِ بَاكُورَةً لِلَّهِ وَلِلْحَمَلِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And in their mouth was found no deceit, for they are without fault before the throne of God.
cells.arabic: وَفِي أَفْوَاهِهِمْ لَمْ يُوجَدْ غِشٌّ، لأَنَّهُمْ بِلاَ عَيْبٍ قُدَّامَ عَرْشِ اللهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I saw another angel flying in the midst of heaven, having the everlasting gospel to preach to those who dwell on the earth—to every nation, tribe, tongue, and people—
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ رَأَيْتُ مَلاَكاً آخَرَ طَائِراً فِي وَسَطِ السَّمَاءِ مَعَهُ بِشَارَةٌ أَبَدِيَّةٌ، لِيُبَشِّرَ السَّاكِنِينَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ وَكُلَّ أُمَّةٍ وَقَبِيلَةٍ وَلِسَانٍ وَشَعْبٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: saying with a loud voice, “Fear God and give glory to Him, for the hour of His judgment has come; and worship Him who made heaven and earth, the sea and springs of water.”
cells.arabic: قَائِلاً بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ: «خَافُوا اللهَ وَأَعْطُوهُ مَجْداً، لأَنَّهُ قَدْ جَاءَتْ سَاعَةُ دَيْنُونَتِهِ. وَاسْجُدُوا لِصَانِعِ السَّمَاءِ وَالأَرْضِ وَالْبَحْرِ وَيَنَابِيعِ الْمِيَاهِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And another angel followed, saying, “Babylon is fallen, is fallen, that great city, because she has made all nations drink of the wine of the wrath of her fornication.”
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ تَبِعَهُ مَلاَكٌ آخَرُ قَائِلاً: «سَقَطَتْ سَقَطَتْ بَابِلُ الْمَدِينَةُ الْعَظِيمَةُ، لأَنَّهَا سَقَتْ جَمِيعَ الأُمَمِ مِنْ خَمْرِ غَضَبِ زِنَاهَا».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then a third angel followed them, saying with a loud voice, “If anyone worships the beast and his image, and receives his mark on his forehead or on his hand,
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ تَبِعَهُمَا مَلاَكٌ ثَالِثٌ قَائِلاً بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ: «إِنْ كَانَ أَحَدٌ يَسْجُدُ لِلْوَحْشِ وَلِصُورَتِهِ، وَيَقْبَلُ سِمَتَهُ عَلَى جَبْهَتِهِ أَوْ عَلَى يَدِهِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: he himself shall also drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is poured out full strength into the cup of His indignation. He shall be tormented with fire and brimstone in the presence of the holy angels and in the presence of the Lamb.
cells.arabic: فَهُوَ أَيْضاً سَيَشْرَبُ مِنْ خَمْرِ غَضَبِ اللهِ الْمَصْبُوبِ صِرْفاً فِي كَأْسِ غَضَبِهِ، وَيُعَذَّبُ بِنَارٍ وَكِبْرِيتٍ أَمَامَ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ الْقِدِّيسِينَ وَأَمَامَ الْحَمَلِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the smoke of their torment ascends forever and ever; and they have no rest day or night, who worship the beast and his image, and whoever receives the mark of his name.”
cells.arabic: وَيَصْعَدُ دُخَانُ عَذَابِهِمْ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ. وَلاَ تَكُونُ رَاحَةٌ نَهَاراً وَلَيْلاً لِلَّذِينَ يَسْجُدُونَ لِلْوَحْشِ وَلِصُورَتِهِ وَلِكُلِّ مَنْ يَقْبَلُ سِمَةَ اسْمِهِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Here is the patience of the saints; here are those who keep the commandments of God and the faith of Jesus.
cells.arabic: هُنَا صَبْرُ الْقِدِّيسِينَ. هُنَا الَّذِينَ يَحْفَظُونَ وَصَايَا اللهِ وَإِيمَانَ يَسُوعَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I heard a voice from heaven saying to me, “Write: ‘Blessed are the dead who die in the Lord from now on.’” “Yes,” says the Spirit, “that they may rest from their labors, and their works follow them.”
cells.arabic: وَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ قَائِلاً لِي: «اكْتُبْ. طُوبَى لِلأَمْوَاتِ الَّذِينَ يَمُوتُونَ فِي الرَّبِّ مُنْذُ الآنَ - نَعَمْ يَقُولُ الرُّوحُ، لِكَيْ يَسْتَرِيحُوا مِنْ أَتْعَابِهِمْ، وَأَعْمَالُهُمْ تَتْبَعُهُمْ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I looked, and behold, a white cloud, and on the cloud sat One like the Son of Man, having on His head a golden crown, and in His hand a sharp sickle.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ نَظَرْتُ وَإِذَا سَحَابَةٌ بَيْضَاءُ، وَعَلَى السَّحَابَةِ جَالِسٌ شِبْهُ ابْنِ إِنْسَانٍ، لَهُ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ إِكْلِيلٌ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ، وَفِي يَدِهِ مِنْجَلٌ حَادٌّ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And another angel came out of the temple, crying with a loud voice to Him who sat on the cloud, “Thrust in Your sickle and reap, for the time has come for You to reap, for the harvest of the earth is ripe.”
cells.arabic: وَخَرَجَ مَلاَكٌ آخَرُ مِنَ الْهَيْكَلِ، يَصْرُخُ بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ إِلَى الْجَالِسِ عَلَى السَّحَابَةِ: «أَرْسِلْ مِنْجَلَكَ وَاحْصُدْ، لأَنَّهُ قَدْ جَاءَتِ السَّاعَةُ لِلْحَصَادِ، إِذْ قَدْ يَبِسَ حَصِيدُ الأَرْضِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So He who sat on the cloud thrust in His sickle on the earth, and the earth was reaped.
cells.arabic: فَأَلْقَى الْجَالِسُ عَلَى السَّحَابَةِ مِنْجَلَهُ عَلَى الأَرْضِ، فَحُصِدَتِ الأَرْضُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then another angel came out of the temple which is in heaven, he also having a sharp sickle.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ خَرَجَ مَلاَكٌ آخَرُ مِنَ الْهَيْكَلِ الَّذِي فِي السَّمَاءِ، مَعَهُ أَيْضاً مِنْجَلٌ حَادٌّ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And another angel came out from the altar, who had power over fire, and he cried with a loud cry to him who had the sharp sickle, saying, “Thrust in your sharp sickle and gather the clusters of the vine of the earth, for her grapes are fully ripe.”
cells.arabic: وَخَرَجَ مَلاَكٌ آخَرُ مِنَ الْمَذْبَحِ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى النَّارِ، وَصَرَخَ صُرَاخاً عَظِيماً إِلَى الَّذِي مَعَهُ الْمِنْجَلُ الْحَادُّ، قَائِلاً: «أَرْسِلْ مِنْجَلَكَ الْحَادَّ وَاقْطِفْ عَنَاقِيدَ كَرْمِ الأَرْضِ، لأَنَّ عِنَبَهَا قَدْ نَضَجَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So the angel thrust his sickle into the earth and gathered the vine of the earth, and threw it into the great winepress of the wrath of God.
cells.arabic: فَأَلْقَى الْمَلاَكُ مِنْجَلَهُ إِلَى الأَرْضِ وَقَطَفَ كَرْمَ الأَرْضِ، فَأَلْقَاهُ إِلَى مَعْصَرَةِ غَضَبِ اللهِ الْعَظِيمَةِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the winepress was trampled outside the city, and blood came out of the winepress, up to the horses’ bridles, for one thousand six hundred furlongs.
cells.arabic: وَدِيسَتِ الْمَعْصَرَةُ خَارِجَ الْمَدِينَةِ، فَخَرَجَ دَمٌ مِنَ الْمَعْصَرَةِ حَتَّى إِلَى لُجُمِ الْخَيْلِ، مَسَافَةَ أَلْفٍ وَسِتِّمِئَةِ غَلْوَةٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I saw another sign in heaven, great and marvelous: seven angels having the seven last plagues, for in them the wrath of God is complete.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ رَأَيْتُ آيَةً أُخْرَى فِي السَّمَاءِ عَظِيمَةً وَعَجِيبَةً: سَبْعَةَ مَلاَئِكَةٍ مَعَهُمُ السَّبْعُ الضَّرَبَاتُ الأَخِيرَةُ، لأَنْ بِهَا أُكْمِلَ غَضَبُ اللهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I saw something like a sea of glass mingled with fire, and those who have the victory over the beast, over his image and over his mark and over the number of his name, standing on the sea of glass, having harps of God.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ كَبَحْرٍ مِنْ زُجَاجٍ مُخْتَلِطٍ بِنَارٍ، وَالْغَالِبِينَ عَلَى الْوَحْشِ وَصُورَتِهِ وَعَلَى سِمَتِهِ وَعَدَدِ اسْمِهِ وَاقِفِينَ عَلَى الْبَحْرِ الزُّجَاجِيِّ، مَعَهُمْ قِيثَارَاتُ اللهِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They sing the song of Moses, the servant of God, and the song of the Lamb, saying: “Great and marvelous are Your works, Lord God Almighty! Just and true are Your ways, O King of the saints!
cells.arabic: وَهُمْ يُرَتِّلُونَ تَرْنِيمَةَ مُوسَى عَبْدِ اللهِ وَتَرْنِيمَةَ الْحَمَلِ قَائِلِينَ: «عَظِيمَةٌ وَعَجِيبَةٌ هِيَ أَعْمَالُكَ أَيُّهَا الرَّبُّ الْإِلَهُ الْقَادِرُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ. عَادِلَةٌ وَحَقٌّ هِيَ طُرُقُكَ يَا مَلِكَ الْقِدِّيسِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Who shall not fear You, O Lord, and glorify Your name? For You alone are holy. For all nations shall come and worship before You, For Your judgments have been manifested.”
cells.arabic: مَنْ لاَ يَخَافُكَ يَا رَبُّ وَيُمَجِّدُ اسْمَكَ، لأَنَّكَ وَحْدَكَ قُدُّوسٌ، لأَنَّ جَمِيعَ الأُمَمِ سَيَأْتُونَ وَيَسْجُدُونَ أَمَامَكَ، لأَنَّ أَحْكَامَكَ قَدْ أُظْهِرَتْ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: After these things I looked, and behold, the temple of the tabernacle of the testimony in heaven was opened.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَعْدَ هَذَا نَظَرْتُ وَإِذَا قَدِ انْفَتَحَ هَيْكَلُ خَيْمَةِ الشَّهَادَةِ فِي السَّمَاءِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And out of the temple came the seven angels having the seven plagues, clothed in pure bright linen, and having their chests girded with golden bands.
cells.arabic: وَخَرَجَتِ السَّبْعَةُ الْمَلاَئِكَةُ وَمَعَهُمُ السَّبْعُ الضَّرَبَاتُ مِنَ الْهَيْكَلِ، وَهُمْ مُتَسَرْبِلُونَ بِكَتَّانٍ نَقِيٍّ وَبَهِيٍّ، وَمُتَمَنْطِقُونَ عِنْدَ صُدُورِهِمْ بِمَنَاطِقَ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then one of the four living creatures gave to the seven angels seven golden bowls full of the wrath of God who lives forever and ever.
cells.arabic: وَوَاحِدٌ مِنَ الأَرْبَعَةِ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ أَعْطَى السَّبْعَةَ الْمَلاَئِكَةَ سَبْعَةَ جَامَاتٍ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ، مَمْلُوَّةٍ مِنْ غَضَبِ اللهِ الْحَيِّ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God and from His power, and no one was able to enter the temple till the seven plagues of the seven angels were completed.
cells.arabic: وَامْتَلَأَ الْهَيْكَلُ دُخَاناً مِنْ مَجْدِ اللهِ وَمِنْ قُدْرَتِهِ، وَلَمْ يَكُنْ أَحَدٌ يَقْدِرُ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ الْهَيْكَلَ حَتَّى كَمِلَتْ سَبْعُ ضَرَبَاتِ السَّبْعَةِ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I heard a loud voice from the temple saying to the seven angels, “Go and pour out the bowls of the wrath of God on the earth.”
cells.arabic: وَسَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً عَظِيماً مِنَ الْهَيْكَلِ قَائِلاً لِلسَّبْعَةِ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ: «امْضُوا وَاسْكُبُوا جَامَاتِ غَضَبِ اللهِ عَلَى الأَرْضِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So the first went and poured out his bowl upon the earth, and a foul and loathsome sore came upon the men who had the mark of the beast and those who worshiped his image.
cells.arabic: فَمَضَى الأَوَّلُ وَسَكَبَ جَامَهُ عَلَى الأَرْضِ فَحَدَثَتْ دَمَامِلُ خَبِيثَةٌ وَرَدِيَّةٌ عَلَى النَّاسِ الَّذِينَ بِهِمْ سِمَةُ الْوَحْشِ وَالَّذِينَ يَسْجُدُونَ لِصُورَتِهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the second angel poured out his bowl on the sea, and it became blood as of a dead man; and every living creature in the sea died.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ سَكَبَ الْمَلاَكُ الثَّانِي جَامَهُ عَلَى الْبَحْرِ، فَصَارَ دَماً كَدَمِ مَيِّتٍ. وَكُلُّ نَفْسٍ حَيَّةٍ مَاتَتْ فِي الْبَحْرِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the third angel poured out his bowl on the rivers and springs of water, and they became blood.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ سَكَبَ الْمَلاَكُ الثَّالِثُ جَامَهُ عَلَى الأَنْهَارِ وَعَلَى يَنَابِيعِ الْمِيَاهِ، فَصَارَتْ دَماً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I heard the angel of the waters saying: “You are righteous, O Lord, The One who is and who was and who is to be, Because You have judged these things.
cells.arabic: وَسَمِعْتُ مَلاَكَ الْمِيَاهِ يَقُولُ: «عَادِلٌ أَنْتَ أَيُّهَا الْكَائِنُ وَالَّذِي كَانَ وَالَّذِي يَكُونُ، لأَنَّكَ حَكَمْتَ هَكَذَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For they have shed the blood of saints and prophets, And You have given them blood to drink. For it is their just due.”
cells.arabic: لأَنَّهُمْ سَفَكُوا دَمَ قِدِّيسِينَ وَأَنْبِيَاءَ، فَأَعْطَيْتَهُمْ دَماً لِيَشْرَبُوا. لأَنَّهُمْ مُسْتَحِقُّونَ!»

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I heard another from the altar saying, “Even so, Lord God Almighty, true and righteous are Your judgments.”
cells.arabic: وَسَمِعْتُ آخَرَ مِنَ الْمَذْبَحِ قَائِلاً: «نَعَمْ أَيُّهَا الرَّبُّ الْإِلَهُ الْقَادِرُ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ! حَقٌّ وَعَادِلَةٌ هِيَ أَحْكَامُكَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the fourth angel poured out his bowl on the sun, and power was given to him to scorch men with fire.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ سَكَبَ الْمَلاَكُ الرَّابِعُ جَامَهُ عَلَى الشَّمْسِ فَأُعْطِيَتْ أَنْ تُحْرِقَ النَّاسَ بِنَارٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And men were scorched with great heat, and they blasphemed the name of God who has power over these plagues; and they did not repent and give Him glory.
cells.arabic: فَاحْتَرَقَ النَّاسُ احْتِرَاقاً عَظِيماً، وَجَدَّفُوا عَلَى اسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى هَذِهِ الضَّرَبَاتِ، وَلَمْ يَتُوبُوا لِيُعْطُوهُ مَجْداً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the fifth angel poured out his bowl on the throne of the beast, and his kingdom became full of darkness; and they gnawed their tongues because of the pain.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ سَكَبَ الْمَلاَكُ الْخَامِسُ جَامَهُ عَلَى عَرْشِ الْوَحْشِ، فَصَارَتْ مَمْلَكَتُهُ مُظْلِمَةً. وَكَانُوا يَعَضُّونَ عَلَى أَلْسِنَتِهِمْ مِنَ الْوَجَعِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores, and did not repent of their deeds.
cells.arabic: وَجَدَّفُوا عَلَى إِلَهِ السَّمَاءِ مِنْ أَوْجَاعِهِمْ وَمِنْ قُرُوحِهِمْ، وَلَمْ يَتُوبُوا عَنْ أَعْمَالِهِمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the sixth angel poured out his bowl on the great river Euphrates, and its water was dried up, so that the way of the kings from the east might be prepared.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ سَكَبَ الْمَلاَكُ السَّادِسُ جَامَهُ عَلَى النَّهْرِ الْكَبِيرِ الْفُرَاتِ، فَنَشِفَ مَاؤُهُ لِكَيْ يُعَدَّ طَرِيقُ الْمُلُوكِ الَّذِينَ مِنْ مَشْرِقِ الشَّمْسِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I saw three unclean spirits like frogs coming out of the mouth of the dragon, out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the false prophet.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ مِنْ فَمِ التِّنِّينِ، وَمِنْ فَمِ الْوَحْشِ، وَمِنْ فَمِ النَّبِيِّ الْكَذَّابِ، ثَلاَثَةَ أَرْوَاحٍ نَجِسَةٍ شِبْهَ ضَفَادِعَ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For they are spirits of demons, performing signs, which go out to the kings of the earth and of the whole world, to gather them to the battle of that great day of God Almighty.
cells.arabic: فَإِنَّهُمْ أَرْوَاحُ شَيَاطِينَ صَانِعَةٌ آيَاتٍ، تَخْرُجُ عَلَى مُلُوكِ الْعَالَمِ وَكُلِّ الْمَسْكُونَةِ لِتَجْمَعَهُمْ لِقِتَالِ ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمِ الْعَظِيمِ، يَوْمِ اللهِ الْقَادِرِ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “Behold, I am coming as a thief. Blessed is he who watches, and keeps his garments, lest he walk naked and they see his shame.”
cells.arabic: «هَا أَنَا آتِي كَلِصٍّ. طُوبَى لِمَنْ يَسْهَرُ وَيَحْفَظُ ثِيَابَهُ لِئَلَّا يَمْشِيَ عُرْيَاناً فَيَرَوْا عُرْيَتَهُ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And they gathered them together to the place called in Hebrew, Armageddon.
cells.arabic: فَجَمَعَهُمْ إِلَى الْمَوْضِعِ الَّذِي يُدْعَى بِالْعِبْرَانِيَّةِ «هَرْمَجَدُّونَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then the seventh angel poured out his bowl into the air, and a loud voice came out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, “It is done!”
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ سَكَبَ الْمَلاَكُ السَّابِعُ جَامَهُ عَلَى الْهَوَاءِ، فَخَرَجَ صَوْتٌ عَظِيمٌ مِنْ هَيْكَلِ السَّمَاءِ مِنَ الْعَرْشِ قَائِلاً: «قَدْ تَمَّ!»

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And there were noises and thunderings and lightnings; and there was a great earthquake, such a mighty and great earthquake as had not occurred since men were on the earth.
cells.arabic: فَحَدَثَتْ أَصْوَاتٌ وَرُعُودٌ وَبُرُوقٌ. وَحَدَثَتْ زَلْزَلَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ لَمْ يَحْدُثْ مِثْلُهَا مُنْذُ صَارَ النَّاسُ عَلَى الأَرْضِ، زَلْزَلَةٌ بِمِقْدَارِهَا عَظِيمَةٌ هَكَذَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now the great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell. And great Babylon was remembered before God, to give her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of His wrath.
cells.arabic: وَصَارَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ الْعَظِيمَةُ ثَلاَثَةَ أَقْسَامٍ، وَمُدُنُ الأُمَمِ سَقَطَتْ، وَبَابِلُ الْعَظِيمَةُ ذُكِرَتْ أَمَامَ اللهِ لِيُعْطِيَهَا كَأْسَ خَمْرِ سَخَطِ غَضَبِهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then every island fled away, and the mountains were not found.
cells.arabic: وَكُلُّ جَزِيرَةٍ هَرَبَتْ وَجِبَالٌ لَمْ تُوجَدْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And great hail from heaven fell upon men, each hailstone about the weight of a talent. Men blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail, since that plague was exceedingly great.
cells.arabic: وَبَرَدٌ عَظِيمٌ، نَحْوُ ثِقَلِ وَزْنَةٍ، نَزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ عَلَى النَّاسِ. فَجَدَّفَ النَّاسُ عَلَى اللهِ مِنْ ضَرْبَةِ الْبَرَدِ، لأَنَّ ضَرْبَتَهُ عَظِيمَةٌ جِدّاً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then one of the seven angels who had the seven bowls came and talked with me, saying to me, “Come, I will show you the judgment of the great harlot who sits on many waters,
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ جَاءَ وَاحِدٌ مِنَ السَّبْعَةِ الْمَلاَئِكَةِ الَّذِينَ مَعَهُمُ السَّبْعَةُ الْجَامَاتُ، وَتَكَلَّمَ مَعِي قَائِلاً لِي: «هَلُمَّ فَأُرِيَكَ دَيْنُونَةَ الزَّانِيَةِ الْعَظِيمَةِ الْجَالِسَةِ عَلَى الْمِيَاهِ الْكَثِيرَةِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: with whom the kings of the earth committed fornication, and the inhabitants of the earth were made drunk with the wine of her fornication.”
cells.arabic: الَّتِي زَنَى مَعَهَا مُلُوكُ الأَرْضِ، وَسَكِرَ سُكَّانُ الأَرْضِ مِنْ خَمْرِ زِنَاهَا».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So he carried me away in the Spirit into the wilderness. And I saw a woman sitting on a scarlet beast which was full of names of blasphemy, having seven heads and ten horns.
cells.arabic: فَمَضَى بِي بِالرُّوحِ إِلَى بَرِّيَّةٍ، فَرَأَيْتُ امْرَأَةً جَالِسَةً عَلَى وَحْشٍ قِرْمِزِيٍّ مَمْلُوءٍ أَسْمَاءَ تَجْدِيفٍ، لَهُ سَبْعَةُ رُؤُوسٍ وَعَشَرَةُ قُرُونٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The woman was arrayed in purple and scarlet, and adorned with gold and precious stones and pearls, having in her hand a golden cup full of abominations and the filthiness of her fornication.
cells.arabic: وَالْمَرْأَةُ كَانَتْ مُتَسَرْبِلَةً بِأُرْجُوانٍ وَقِرْمِزٍ، وَمُتَحَلِّيَةً بِذَهَبٍ وَحِجَارَةٍ كَرِيمَةٍ وَلُؤْلُؤٍ، وَمَعَهَا كَأْسٌ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ فِي يَدِهَا مَمْلُوَّةٌ رَجَاسَاتٍ وَنَجَاسَاتِ زِنَاهَا،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And on her forehead a name was written: MYSTERY, BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS AND OF THE ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH.
cells.arabic: وَعَلَى جِبْهَتِهَا اسْمٌ مَكْتُوبٌ: «سِرٌّ. بَابِلُ الْعَظِيمَةُ أُمُّ الزَّوَانِي وَرَجَاسَاتِ الأَرْضِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I saw the woman, drunk with the blood of the saints and with the blood of the martyrs of Jesus. And when I saw her, I marveled with great amazement.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ الْمَرْأَةَ سَكْرَى مِنْ دَمِ الْقِدِّيسِينَ وَمِنْ دَمِ شُهَدَاءِ يَسُوعَ. فَتَعَجَّبْتُ لَمَّا رَأَيْتُهَا تَعَجُّباً عَظِيماً!

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But the angel said to me, “Why did you marvel? I will tell you the mystery of the woman and of the beast that carries her, which has the seven heads and the ten horns.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي الْمَلاَكُ: «لِمَاذَا تَعَجَّبْتَ؟ أَنَا أَقُولُ لَكَ سِرَّ الْمَرْأَةِ وَالْوَحْشِ الْحَامِلِ لَهَا، الَّذِي لَهُ السَّبْعَةُ الرُّؤُوسُ وَالْعَشَرَةُ الْقُرُونُ:

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The beast that you saw was, and is not, and will ascend out of the bottomless pit and go to perdition. And those who dwell on the earth will marvel, whose names are not written in the Book of Life from the foundation of the world, when they see the beast that was, and is not, and yet is.
cells.arabic: الْوَحْشُ الَّذِي رَأَيْتَ، كَانَ وَلَيْسَ الآنَ، وَهُوَ عَتِيدٌ أَنْ يَصْعَدَ مِنَ الْهَاوِيَةِ وَيَمْضِيَ إِلَى الْهَلاَكِ. وَسَيَتَعَجَّبُ السَّاكِنُونَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ الَّذِينَ لَيْسَتْ أَسْمَاؤُهُمْ مَكْتُوبَةً فِي سِفْرِ الْحَيَاةِ مُنْذُ تَأْسِيسِ الْعَالَمِ، حِينَمَا يَرَوْنَ الْوَحْشَ أَنَّهُ كَانَ وَلَيْسَ الآنَ، مَعَ أَنَّهُ كَائِنٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “Here is the mind which has wisdom: The seven heads are seven mountains on which the woman sits.
cells.arabic: هُنَا الذِّهْنُ الَّذِي لَهُ حِكْمَةٌ! السَّبْعَةُ الرُّؤُوسُ هِيَ سَبْعَةُ جِبَالٍ عَلَيْهَا الْمَرْأَةُ جَالِسَةً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: There are also seven kings. Five have fallen, one is, and the other has not yet come. And when he comes, he must continue a short time.
cells.arabic: وَسَبْعَةُ مُلُوكٍ: خَمْسَةٌ سَقَطُوا، وَوَاحِدٌ مَوْجُودٌ، وَالآخَرُ لَمْ يَأْتِ بَعْدُ. وَمَتَى أَتَى يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يَبْقَى قَلِيلاً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The beast that was, and is not, is himself also the eighth, and is of the seven, and is going to perdition.
cells.arabic: وَالْوَحْشُ الَّذِي كَانَ وَلَيْسَ الآنَ فَهُوَ ثَامِنٌ، وَهُوَ مِنَ السَّبْعَةِ، وَيَمْضِي إِلَى الْهَلاَكِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “The ten horns which you saw are ten kings who have received no kingdom as yet, but they receive authority for one hour as kings with the beast.
cells.arabic: وَالْعَشَرَةُ الْقُرُونُ الَّتِي رَأَيْتَ هِيَ عَشَرَةُ مُلُوكٍ لَمْ يَأْخُذُوا مُلْكاً بَعْدُ، لَكِنَّهُمْ يَأْخُذُونَ سُلْطَانَهُمْ كَمُلُوكٍ سَاعَةً وَاحِدَةً مَعَ الْوَحْشِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: These are of one mind, and they will give their power and authority to the beast.
cells.arabic: هَؤُلاَءِ لَهُمْ رَأْيٌ وَاحِدٌ، وَيُعْطُونَ الْوَحْشَ قُدْرَتَهُمْ وَسُلْطَانَهُمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: These will make war with the Lamb, and the Lamb will overcome them, for He is Lord of lords and King of kings; and those who are with Him are called, chosen, and faithful.”
cells.arabic: هَؤُلاَءِ سَيُحَارِبُونَ الْحَمَلَ، وَالْحَمَلُ يَغْلِبُهُمْ، لأَنَّهُ رَبُّ الأَرْبَابِ وَمَلِكُ الْمُلُوكِ، وَالَّذِينَ مَعَهُ مَدْعُوُّونَ وَمُخْتَارُونَ وَمُؤْمِنُونَ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then he said to me, “The waters which you saw, where the harlot sits, are peoples, multitudes, nations, and tongues.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ قَالَ لِيَ: «الْمِيَاهُ الَّتِي رَأَيْتَ حَيْثُ الزَّانِيَةُ جَالِسَةٌ هِيَ شُعُوبٌ وَجُمُوعٌ وَأُمَمٌ وَأَلْسِنَةٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the ten horns which you saw on the beast, these will hate the harlot, make her desolate and naked, eat her flesh and burn her with fire.
cells.arabic: وَأَمَّا الْعَشَرَةُ الْقُرُونُ الَّتِي رَأَيْتَ عَلَى الْوَحْشِ فَهَؤُلاَءِ سَيُبْغِضُونَ الزَّانِيَةَ، وَسَيَجْعَلُونَهَا خَرِبَةً وَعُرْيَانَةً، وَيَأْكُلُونَ لَحْمَهَا وَيُحْرِقُونَهَا بِالنَّارِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For God has put it into their hearts to fulfill His purpose, to be of one mind, and to give their kingdom to the beast, until the words of God are fulfilled.
cells.arabic: لأَنَّ اللهَ وَضَعَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ أَنْ يَصْنَعُوا رَأْيَهُ، وَأَنْ يَصْنَعُوا رَأْياً وَاحِداً، وَيُعْطُوا الْوَحْشَ مُلْكَهُمْ حَتَّى تُكْمَلَ أَقْوَالُ اللهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the woman whom you saw is that great city which reigns over the kings of the earth.”
cells.arabic: وَالْمَرْأَةُ الَّتِي رَأَيْتَ هِيَ الْمَدِينَةُ الْعَظِيمَةُ الَّتِي لَهَا مُلْكٌ عَلَى مُلُوكِ الأَرْضِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: After these things I saw another angel coming down from heaven, having great authority, and the earth was illuminated with his glory.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ بَعْدَ هَذَا رَأَيْتُ مَلاَكاً آخَرَ نَازِلاً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ، لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَظِيمٌ. وَاسْتَنَارَتِ الأَرْضُ مِنْ بَهَائِهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And he cried mightily with a loud voice, saying, “Babylon the great is fallen, is fallen, and has become a dwelling place of demons, a prison for every foul spirit, and a cage for every unclean and hated bird!
cells.arabic: وَصَرَخَ بِشِدَّةٍ بِصَوْتٍ عَظِيمٍ قَائِلاً: «سَقَطَتْ سَقَطَتْ بَابِلُ الْعَظِيمَةُ، وَصَارَتْ مَسْكَناً لِشَيَاطِينَ، وَمَحْرَساً لِكُلِّ رُوحٍ نَجِسٍ، وَمَحْرَساً لِكُلِّ طَائِرٍ نَجِسٍ وَمَمْقُوتٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For all the nations have drunk of the wine of the wrath of her fornication, the kings of the earth have committed fornication with her, and the merchants of the earth have become rich through the abundance of her luxury.”
cells.arabic: لأَنَّهُ مِنْ خَمْرِ غَضَبِ زِنَاهَا قَدْ شَرِبَ جَمِيعُ الأُمَمِ، وَمُلُوكُ الأَرْضِ زَنُوا مَعَهَا، وَتُجَّارُ الأَرْضِ اسْتَغْنُوا مِنْ وَفْرَةِ نَعِيمِهَا».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I heard another voice from heaven saying, “Come out of her, my people, lest you share in her sins, and lest you receive of her plagues.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ سَمِعْتُ صَوْتاً آخَرَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ قَائِلاً: «اخْرُجُوا مِنْهَا يَا شَعْبِي لِئَلَّا تَشْتَرِكُوا فِي خَطَايَاهَا، وَلِئَلَّا تَأْخُذُوا مِنْ ضَرَبَاتِهَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For her sins have reached to heaven, and God has remembered her iniquities.
cells.arabic: لأَنَّ خَطَايَاهَا لَحِقَتِ السَّمَاءَ، وَتَذَكَّرَ اللهُ آثَامَهَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Render to her just as she rendered to you, and repay her double according to her works; in the cup which she has mixed, mix double for her.
cells.arabic: جَازُوهَا كَمَا هِيَ أَيْضاً جَازَتْكُمْ، وَضَاعِفُوا لَهَا ضِعْفاً نَظِيرَ أَعْمَالِهَا. فِي الْكَأْسِ الَّتِي مَزَجَتْ فِيهَا امْزُجُوا لَهَا ضِعْفاً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: In the measure that she glorified herself and lived luxuriously, in the same measure give her torment and sorrow; for she says in her heart, ‘I sit as queen, and am no widow, and will not see sorrow.’
cells.arabic: بِقَدْرِ مَا مَجَّدَتْ نَفْسَهَا وَتَنَعَّمَتْ، بِقَدْرِ ذَلِكَ أَعْطُوهَا عَذَاباً وَحُزْناً. لأَنَّهَا تَقُولُ فِي قَلْبِهَا: أَنَا جَالِسَةٌ مَلِكَةً، وَلَسْتُ أَرْمَلَةً، وَلَنْ أَرَى حُزْناً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Therefore her plagues will come in one day—death and mourning and famine. And she will be utterly burned with fire, for strong is the Lord God who judges her.
cells.arabic: مِنْ أَجْلِ ذَلِكَ فِي يَوْمٍ وَاحِدٍ سَتَأْتِي ضَرَبَاتُهَا: مَوْتٌ وَحُزْنٌ وَجُوعٌ، وَتَحْتَرِقُ بِالنَّارِ، لأَنَّ الرَّبَّ الْإِلَهَ الَّذِي يَدِينُهَا قَوِيٌّ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “The kings of the earth who committed fornication and lived luxuriously with her will weep and lament for her, when they see the smoke of her burning,
cells.arabic: «وَسَيَبْكِي وَيَنُوحُ عَلَيْهَا مُلُوكُ الأَرْضِ، الَّذِينَ زَنُوا وَتَنَعَّمُوا مَعَهَا، حِينَمَا يَنْظُرُونَ دُخَانَ حَرِيقِهَا،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: standing at a distance for fear of her torment, saying, ‘Alas, alas, that great city Babylon, that mighty city! For in one hour your judgment has come.’
cells.arabic: وَاقِفِينَ مِنْ بَعِيدٍ لأَجْلِ خَوْفِ عَذَابِهَا قَائِلِينَ: وَيْلٌ وَيْلٌ! الْمَدِينَةُ الْعَظِيمَةُ بَابِلُ! الْمَدِينَةُ الْقَوِيَّةُ! لأَنَّهُ فِي سَاعَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ جَاءَتْ دَيْنُونَتُكِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “And the merchants of the earth will weep and mourn over her, for no one buys their merchandise anymore:
cells.arabic: وَيَبْكِي تُجَّارُ الأَرْضِ وَيَنُوحُونَ عَلَيْهَا، لأَنَّ بَضَائِعَهُمْ لاَ يَشْتَرِيهَا أَحَدٌ فِي مَا بَعْدُ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: merchandise of gold and silver, precious stones and pearls, fine linen and purple, silk and scarlet, every kind of citron wood, every kind of object of ivory, every kind of object of most precious wood, bronze, iron, and marble;
cells.arabic: بَضَائِعَ مِنَ الذَّهَبِ وَالْفِضَّةِ وَالْحَجَرِ الْكَرِيمِ وَاللُّؤْلُؤِ وَالْبَزِّ وَالأُرْجُوانِ وَالْحَرِيرِ وَالْقِرْمِزِ وَكُلَّ عُودٍ ثِينِيٍّ وَكُلَّ إِنَاءٍ مِنَ الْعَاجِ وَكُلَّ إِنَاءٍ مِنْ أَثْمَنِ الْخَشَبِ وَالنُّحَاسِ وَالْحَدِيدِ وَالْمَرْمَرِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and cinnamon and incense, fragrant oil and frankincense, wine and oil, fine flour and wheat, cattle and sheep, horses and chariots, and bodies and souls of men.
cells.arabic: وَقِرْفَةً وَبَخُوراً وَطِيباً وَلُبَاناً وَخَمْراً وَزَيْتاً وَسَمِيذاً وَحِنْطَةً وَبَهَائِمَ وَغَنَماً وَخَيْلاً، وَمَرْكَبَاتٍ، وَأَجْسَاداً، وَنُفُوسَ النَّاسِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The fruit that your soul longed for has gone from you, and all the things which are rich and splendid have gone from you, and you shall find them no more at all.
cells.arabic: وَذَهَبَ عَنْكِ جَنَى شَهْوَةِ نَفْسِكِ، وَذَهَبَ عَنْكِ كُلُّ مَا هُوَ مُشْحِمٌ وَبَهِيٌّ، وَلَنْ تَجِدِيهِ فِي مَا بَعْدُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The merchants of these things, who became rich by her, will stand at a distance for fear of her torment, weeping and wailing,
cells.arabic: تُجَّارُ هَذِهِ الأَشْيَاءِ الَّذِينَ اسْتَغْنُوا مِنْهَا سَيَقِفُونَ مِنْ بَعِيدٍ، مِنْ أَجْلِ خَوْفِ عَذَابِهَا، يَبْكُونَ وَيَنُوحُونَ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and saying, ‘Alas, alas, that great city that was clothed in fine linen, purple, and scarlet, and adorned with gold and precious stones and pearls!
cells.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ: وَيْلٌ وَيْلٌ! الْمَدِينَةُ الْعَظِيمَةُ الْمُتَسَرْبِلَةُ بِبَزٍّ وَأُرْجُوانٍ وَقِرْمِزٍ، وَالْمُتَحَلِّيَةُ بِذَهَبٍ وَحَجَرٍ كَرِيمٍ وَلُؤْلُؤٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For in one hour such great riches came to nothing.’ Every shipmaster, all who travel by ship, sailors, and as many as trade on the sea, stood at a distance
cells.arabic: لأَنَّهُ فِي سَاعَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ خَرِبَ غِنىً مِثْلُ هَذَا. وَكُلُّ رُبَّانٍ، وَكُلُّ الْجَمَاعَةِ فِي السُّفُنِ، وَالْمَلاَّحُونَ وَجَمِيعُ عُمَّالِ الْبَحْرِ، وَقَفُوا مِنْ بَعِيدٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and cried out when they saw the smoke of her burning, saying, ‘What is like this great city?’
cells.arabic: وَصَرَخُوا إِذْ نَظَرُوا دُخَانَ حَرِيقِهَا قَائِلِينَ: أَيَّةُ مَدِينَةٍ مِثْلُ الْمَدِينَةِ الْعَظِيمَةِ؟

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “They threw dust on their heads and cried out, weeping and wailing, and saying, ‘Alas, alas, that great city, in which all who had ships on the sea became rich by her wealth! For in one hour she is made desolate.’
cells.arabic: وَأَلْقُوا تُرَاباً عَلَى رُؤُوسِهِمْ، وَصَرَخُوا بَاكِينَ وَنَائِحِينَ قَائِلِينَ: «وَيْلٌ وَيْلٌ! الْمَدِينَةُ الْعَظِيمَةُ، الَّتِي فِيهَا اسْتَغْنَى جَمِيعُ الَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُفُنٌ فِي الْبَحْرِ مِنْ نَفَائِسِهَا، لأَنَّهَا فِي سَاعَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ خَرِبَتْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “Rejoice over her, O heaven, and you holy apostles and prophets, for God has avenged you on her!”
cells.arabic: اِفْرَحِي لَهَا أَيَّتُهَا السَّمَاءُ وَالرُّسُلُ الْقِدِّيسُونَ وَالأَنْبِيَاءُ، لأَنَّ الرَّبَّ قَدْ دَانَهَا دَيْنُونَتَكُمْ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then a mighty angel took up a stone like a great millstone and threw it into the sea, saying, “Thus with violence the great city Babylon shall be thrown down, and shall not be found anymore.
cells.arabic: وَرَفَعَ مَلاَكٌ وَاحِدٌ قَوِيٌّ حَجَراً كَرَحىً عَظِيمَةً، وَرَمَاهُ فِي الْبَحْرِ قَائِلاً: «هَكَذَا بِدَفْعٍ سَتُرْمَى بَابِلُ الْمَدِينَةُ الْعَظِيمَةُ، وَلَنْ تُوجَدَ فِي مَا بَعْدُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The sound of harpists, musicians, flutists, and trumpeters shall not be heard in you anymore. No craftsman of any craft shall be found in you anymore, and the sound of a millstone shall not be heard in you anymore.
cells.arabic: وَصَوْتُ الضَّارِبِينَ بِالْقِيثَارَةِ وَالْمُغَنِّينَ وَالْمُزَمِّرِينَ وَالنَّافِخِينَ بِالْبُوقِ لَنْ يُسْمَعَ فِيكِ فِي مَا بَعْدُ. وَكُلُّ صَانِعٍ صِنَاعَةً لَنْ يُوجَدَ فِيكِ فِي مَا بَعْدُ. وَصَوْتُ رَحىً لَنْ يُسْمَعَ فِيكِ فِي مَا بَعْدُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The light of a lamp shall not shine in you anymore, and the voice of bridegroom and bride shall not be heard in you anymore. For your merchants were the great men of the earth, for by your sorcery all the nations were deceived.
cells.arabic: وَنُورُ سِرَاجٍ لَنْ يُضِيءَ فِيكِ فِي مَا بَعْدُ. وَصَوْتُ عَرِيسٍ وَعَرُوسٍ لَنْ يُسْمَعَ فِيكِ فِي مَا بَعْدُ. لأَنَّ تُجَّارَكِ كَانُوا عُظَمَاءَ الأَرْضِ. إِذْ بِسِحْرِكِ ضَلَّتْ جَمِيعُ الأُمَمِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And in her was found the blood of prophets and saints, and of all who were slain on the earth.”
cells.arabic: وَفِيهَا وُجِدَ دَمُ أَنْبِيَاءَ وَقِدِّيسِينَ، وَجَمِيعُ مَنْ قُتِلَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ».

title: Revelation 19
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I saw an angel coming down from heaven, having the key to the bottomless pit and a great chain in his hand.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ مَلاَكاً نَازِلاً مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَعَهُ مِفْتَاحُ الْهَاوِيَةِ، وَسِلْسِلَةٌ عَظِيمَةٌ عَلَى يَدِهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He laid hold of the dragon, that serpent of old, who is the Devil and Satan, and bound him for a thousand years;
cells.arabic: فَقَبَضَ عَلَى التِّنِّينِ، الْحَيَّةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ، الَّذِي هُوَ إِبْلِيسُ وَالشَّيْطَانُ، وَقَيَّدَهُ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and he cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal on him, so that he should deceive the nations no more till the thousand years were finished. But after these things he must be released for a little while.
cells.arabic: وَطَرَحَهُ فِي الْهَاوِيَةِ وَأَغْلَقَ عَلَيْهِ، وَخَتَمَ عَلَيْهِ لِكَيْ لاَ يُضِلَّ الأُمَمَ فِي مَا بَعْدُ حَتَّى تَتِمَّ الأَلْفُ السَّنَةِ. وَبَعْدَ ذَلِكَ لاَ بُدَّ أَنْ يُحَلَّ زَمَاناً يَسِيراً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I saw thrones, and they sat on them, and judgment was committed to them. Then I saw the souls of those who had been beheaded for their witness to Jesus and for the word of God, who had not worshiped the beast or his image, and had not received his mark on their foreheads or on their hands. And they lived and reigned with Christ for a thousand years.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ عُرُوشاً فَجَلَسُوا عَلَيْهَا، وَأُعْطُوا حُكْماً. وَرَأَيْتُ نُفُوسَ الَّذِينَ قُتِلُوا مِنْ أَجْلِ شَهَادَةِ يَسُوعَ وَمِنْ أَجْلِ كَلِمَةِ اللهِ. وَالَّذِينَ لَمْ يَسْجُدُوا لِلْوَحْشِ وَلاَ لِصُورَتِهِ، وَلَمْ يَقْبَلُوا السِّمَةَ عَلَى جِبَاهِهِمْ وَعَلَى أَيْدِيهِمْ، فَعَاشُوا وَمَلَكُوا مَعَ الْمَسِيحِ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But the rest of the dead did not live again until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection.
cells.arabic: وَأَمَّا بَقِيَّةُ الأَمْوَاتِ فَلَمْ تَعِشْ حَتَّى تَتِمَّ الأَلْفُ السَّنَةِ. هَذِهِ هِيَ الْقِيَامَةُ الأُولَى.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Blessed and holy is he who has part in the first resurrection. Over such the second death has no power, but they shall be priests of God and of Christ, and shall reign with Him a thousand years.
cells.arabic: مُبَارَكٌ وَمُقَدَّسٌ مَنْ لَهُ نَصِيبٌ فِي الْقِيَامَةِ الأُولَى. هَؤُلاَءِ لَيْسَ لِلْمَوْتِ الثَّانِي سُلْطَانٌ عَلَيْهِمْ، بَلْ سَيَكُونُونَ كَهَنَةً لِلَّهِ وَالْمَسِيحِ، وَسَيَمْلِكُونَ مَعَهُ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now when the thousand years have expired, Satan will be released from his prison
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ مَتَى تَمَّتِ الأَلْفُ السَّنَةِ يُحَلُّ الشَّيْطَانُ مِنْ سِجْنِهِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and will go out to deceive the nations which are in the four corners of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to battle, whose number is as the sand of the sea.
cells.arabic: وَيَخْرُجُ لِيُضِلَّ الأُمَمَ الَّذِينَ فِي أَرْبَعِ زَوَايَا الأَرْضِ: جُوجَ وَمَاجُوجَ، لِيَجْمَعَهُمْ لِلْحَرْبِ، الَّذِينَ عَدَدُهُمْ مِثْلُ رَمْلِ الْبَحْرِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They went up on the breadth of the earth and surrounded the camp of the saints and the beloved city. And fire came down from God out of heaven and devoured them.
cells.arabic: فَصَعِدُوا عَلَى عَرْضِ الأَرْضِ، وَأَحَاطُوا بِمُعَسْكَرِ الْقِدِّيسِينَ وَبِالْمَدِينَةِ الْمَحْبُوبَةِ، فَنَزَلَتْ نَارٌ مِنْ عِنْدِ اللهِ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ وَأَكَلَتْهُمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The devil, who deceived them, was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone where the beast and the false prophet are. And they will be tormented day and night forever and ever.
cells.arabic: وَإِبْلِيسُ الَّذِي كَانَ يُضِلُّهُمْ طُرِحَ فِي بُحَيْرَةِ النَّارِ وَالْكِبْرِيتِ، حَيْثُ الْوَحْشُ وَالنَّبِيُّ الْكَذَّابُ. وَسَيُعَذَّبُونَ نَهَاراً وَلَيْلاً إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then I saw a great white throne and Him who sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away. And there was found no place for them.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ رَأَيْتُ عَرْشاً عَظِيماً أَبْيَضَ، وَالْجَالِسَ عَلَيْهِ الَّذِي مِنْ وَجْهِهِ هَرَبَتِ الأَرْضُ وَالسَّمَاءُ، وَلَمْ يُوجَدْ لَهُمَا مَوْضِعٌ!

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I saw the dead, small and great, standing before God, and books were opened. And another book was opened, which is the Book of Life. And the dead were judged according to their works, by the things which were written in the books.
cells.arabic: وَرَأَيْتُ الأَمْوَاتَ صِغَاراً وَكِبَاراً وَاقِفِينَ أَمَامَ اللهِ، وَانْفَتَحَتْ أَسْفَارٌ. وَانْفَتَحَ سِفْرٌ آخَرُ هُوَ سِفْرُ الْحَيَاةِ، وَدِينَ الأَمْوَاتُ مِمَّا هُوَ مَكْتُوبٌ فِي الأَسْفَارِ بِحَسَبِ أَعْمَالِهِمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The sea gave up the dead who were in it, and Death and Hades delivered up the dead who were in them. And they were judged, each one according to his works.
cells.arabic: وَسَلَّمَ الْبَحْرُ الأَمْوَاتَ الَّذِينَ فِيهِ، وَسَلَّمَ الْمَوْتُ وَالْهَاوِيَةُ الأَمْوَاتَ الَّذِينَ فِيهِمَا. وَدِينُوا كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ بِحَسَبِ أَعْمَالِهِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then Death and Hades were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death.
cells.arabic: وَطُرِحَ الْمَوْتُ وَالْهَاوِيَةُ فِي بُحَيْرَةِ النَّارِ. هَذَا هُوَ الْمَوْتُ الثَّانِي.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And anyone not found written in the Book of Life was cast into the lake of fire.
cells.arabic: وَكُلُّ مَنْ لَمْ يُوجَدْ مَكْتُوباً فِي سِفْرِ الْحَيَاةِ طُرِحَ فِي بُحَيْرَةِ النَّارِ.

title: Revelation 21
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And he showed me a pure river of water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding from the throne of God and of the Lamb.
cells.arabic: وَأَرَانِي نَهْراً صَافِياً مِنْ مَاءِ حَيَاةٍ لاَمِعاً كَبَلُّورٍ خَارِجاً مِنْ عَرْشِ اللهِ وَالْحَمَلِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: In the middle of its street, and on either side of the river, was the tree of life, which bore twelve fruits, each tree yielding its fruit every month. The leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.
cells.arabic: فِي وَسَطِ سُوقِهَا وَعَلَى النَّهْرِ مِنْ هُنَا وَمِنْ هُنَاكَ شَجَرَةُ حَيَاةٍ تَصْنَعُ اثْنَتَيْ عَشْرَةَ ثَمَرَةً، وَتُعْطِي كُلَّ شَهْرٍ ثَمَرَهَا، وَوَرَقُ الشَّجَرَةِ لِشِفَاءِ الأُمَمِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And there shall be no more curse, but the throne of God and of the Lamb shall be in it, and His servants shall serve Him.
cells.arabic: وَلاَ تَكُونُ لَعْنَةٌ مَا فِي مَا بَعْدُ. وَعَرْشُ اللهِ وَالْحَمَلِ يَكُونُ فِيهَا، وَعَبِيدُهُ يَخْدِمُونَهُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They shall see His face, and His name shall be on their foreheads.
cells.arabic: وَهُمْ سَيَنْظُرُونَ وَجْهَهُ، وَاسْمُهُ عَلَى جِبَاهِهِمْ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: There shall be no night there: They need no lamp nor light of the sun, for the Lord God gives them light. And they shall reign forever and ever.
cells.arabic: وَلاَ يَكُونُ لَيْلٌ هُنَاكَ، وَلاَ يَحْتَاجُونَ إِلَى سِرَاجٍ أَوْ نُورِ شَمْسٍ، لأَنَّ الرَّبَّ الْإِلَهَ يُنِيرُ عَلَيْهِمْ، وَهُمْ سَيَمْلِكُونَ إِلَى أَبَدِ الآبِدِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then he said to me, “These words are faithful and true.” And the Lord God of the holy prophets sent His angel to show His servants the things which must shortly take place.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ قَالَ لِي: «هَذِهِ الأَقْوَالُ أَمِينَةٌ وَصَادِقَةٌ. وَالرَّبُّ إِلَهُ الأَنْبِيَاءِ الْقِدِّيسِينَ أَرْسَلَ مَلاَكَهُ لِيُرِيَ عَبِيدَهُ مَا يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يَكُونَ سَرِيعاً».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “Behold, I am coming quickly! Blessed is he who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book.”
cells.arabic: «هَا أَنَا آتِي سَرِيعاً. طُوبَى لِمَنْ يَحْفَظُ أَقْوَالَ نُبُوَّةِ هَذَا الْكِتَابِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now I, John, saw and heard these things. And when I heard and saw, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel who showed me these things.
cells.arabic: وَأَنَا يُوحَنَّا الَّذِي كَانَ يَنْظُرُ وَيَسْمَعُ هَذَا. وَحِينَ سَمِعْتُ وَنَظَرْتُ، خَرَرْتُ لأَسْجُدَ أَمَامَ رِجْلَيِ الْمَلاَكِ الَّذِي كَانَ يُرِينِي هَذَا.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then he said to me, “See that you do not do that. For I am your fellow servant, and of your brethren the prophets, and of those who keep the words of this book. Worship God.”
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ لِيَ: «انْظُرْ لاَ تَفْعَلْ! لأَنِّي عَبْدٌ مَعَكَ وَمَعَ إِخْوَتِكَ الأَنْبِيَاءِ، وَالَّذِينَ يَحْفَظُونَ أَقْوَالَ هَذَا الْكِتَابِ. اسْجُدْ لِلَّهِ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And he said to me, “Do not seal the words of the prophecy of this book, for the time is at hand.
cells.arabic: وَقَالَ لِي: «لاَ تَخْتِمْ عَلَى أَقْوَالِ نُبُوَّةِ هَذَا الْكِتَابِ، لأَنَّ الْوَقْتَ قَرِيبٌ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He who is unjust, let him be unjust still; he who is filthy, let him be filthy still; he who is righteous, let him be righteous still; he who is holy, let him be holy still.”
cells.arabic: مَنْ يَظْلِمْ فَلْيَظْلِمْ بَعْدُ. وَمَنْ هُوَ نَجِسٌ فَلْيَتَنَجَّسْ بَعْدُ. وَمَنْ هُوَ بَارٌّ فَلْيَتَبَرَّرْ بَعْدُ. وَمَنْ هُوَ مُقَدَّسٌ فَلْيَتَقَدَّسْ بَعْدُ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “And behold, I am coming quickly, and My reward is with Me, to give to every one according to his work.
cells.arabic: «وَهَا أَنَا آتِي سَرِيعاً وَأُجْرَتِي مَعِي لِأُجَازِيَ كُلَّ وَاحِدٍ كَمَا يَكُونُ عَمَلُهُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I am the Alpha and the Omega, the Beginning and the End, the First and the Last.”
cells.arabic: أَنَا الأَلِفُ وَالْيَاءُ، الْبِدَايَةُ وَالنِّهَايَةُ، الأَوَّلُ وَالآخِرُ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Blessed are those who do His commandments, that they may have the right to the tree of life, and may enter through the gates into the city.
cells.arabic: طُوبَى لِلَّذِينَ يَصْنَعُونَ وَصَايَاهُ لِكَيْ يَكُونَ سُلْطَانُهُمْ عَلَى شَجَرَةِ الْحَيَاةِ وَيَدْخُلُوا مِنَ الأَبْوَابِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ،

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But outside are dogs and sorcerers and sexually immoral and murderers and idolaters, and whoever loves and practices a lie.
cells.arabic: لأَنَّ خَارِجاً الْكِلاَبَ وَالسَّحَرَةَ وَالزُّنَاةَ وَالْقَتَلَةَ وَعَبَدَةَ الأَوْثَانِ، وَكُلَّ مَنْ يُحِبُّ وَيَصْنَعُ كَذِباً.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “I, Jesus, have sent My angel to testify to you these things in the churches. I am the Root and the Offspring of David, the Bright and Morning Star.”
cells.arabic: «أَنَا يَسُوعُ، أَرْسَلْتُ مَلاَكِي لأَشْهَدَ لَكُمْ بِهَذِهِ الأُمُورِ عَنِ الْكَنَائِسِ. أَنَا أَصْلُ وَذُرِّيَّةُ دَاوُدَ. كَوْكَبُ الصُّبْحِ الْمُنِيرُ».

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” And let him who hears say, “Come!” And let him who thirsts come. Whoever desires, let him take the water of life freely.
cells.arabic: وَالرُّوحُ وَالْعَرُوسُ يَقُولاَنِ: «تَعَالَ». وَمَنْ يَسْمَعْ فَلْيَقُلْ: «تَعَالَ». وَمَنْ يَعْطَشْ فَلْيَأْتِ. وَمَنْ يُرِدْ فَلْيَأْخُذْ مَاءَ حَيَاةٍ مَجَّاناً

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For I testify to everyone who hears the words of the prophecy of this book: If anyone adds to these things, God will add to him the plagues that are written in this book;
cells.arabic: لأَنِّي أَشْهَدُ لِكُلِّ مَنْ يَسْمَعُ أَقْوَالَ نُبُوَّةِ هَذَا الْكِتَابِ: إِنْ كَانَ أَحَدٌ يَزِيدُ عَلَى هَذَا يَزِيدُ اللهُ عَلَيْهِ الضَّرَبَاتِ الْمَكْتُوبَةَ فِي هَذَا الْكِتَابِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and if anyone takes away from the words of the book of this prophecy, God shall take away his part from the Book of Life, from the holy city, and from the things which are written in this book.
cells.arabic: وَإِنْ كَانَ أَحَدٌ يَحْذِفُ مِنْ أَقْوَالِ كِتَابِ هَذِهِ النُّبُوَّةِ يَحْذِفُ اللهُ نَصِيبَهُ مِنْ سِفْرِ الْحَيَاةِ، وَمِنَ الْمَدِينَةِ الْمُقَدَّسَةِ، وَمِنَ الْمَكْتُوبِ فِي هَذَا الْكِتَابِ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He who testifies to these things says, “Surely I am coming quickly.” Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus!
cells.arabic: يَقُولُ الشَّاهِدُ بِهَذَا: «نَعَمْ! أَنَا آتِي سَرِيعاً». آمِينَ. تَعَالَ أَيُّهَا الرَّبُّ يَسُوعُ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
cells.arabic: نِعْمَةُ رَبِّنَا يَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحِ مَعَ جَمِيعِكُمْ. آمِينَ.

title: Vigil of the Apocalypse - Revelation.fixed
seasons: Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekend ^ JoyousSaturday ^ Saturdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Amen. Lord have mercy. Lord have mercy. Lord have mercy.
cells.coptic: Ⲁⲙⲏⲛ. Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ. Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ. Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ.
cells.arabic: آمين. يارب إرحم. يارب إرحم. يارب إرحم
